highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Gyanarthi Media College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

faqs.question: Is it worth to consider Gyanarthi Media College as a good Institute?
faqs.answer: Gyanarthi Media College is a renowned institution offering M.A, M.Sc, B.A, B.Sc, BFA. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Animation, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Gyanarthi Media College boasts an impressive review rating of 4.8 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4.75 for Campus Life, 4.5 for Placements, 4.75 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Gyanarthi Media College?
faqs.answer: Gyanarthi Media College is a well-known institution for M.A, M.Sc, B.A, B.Sc, BFA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Gyanarthi Media College has course specializations in Fashion Design.

faqs.question: What are the courses that Gyanarthi Media College offers?
faqs.answer: Gyanarthi Media College provides programmes including M.A, M.Sc, B.A, B.Sc, BFA in streams such as Animation, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Fashion Design.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at Gyanarthi Media College during placements?
faqs.answer: Gyanarthi Media College offers placement support to its students. Notable organizations that visit the institute for recruitment include Metlife, Vantec Logistics India Private Limited, Radiant Enterprises Placed With Asian Paints Ltd, Shraddha Lifestyle Llp, Maruva Naturals, Barallogisticspvtltd, Oem Based Company, Aswartha Condition Monitoring Engineers, Asset Financial Consultants Pvt Ltd, Disha Publications, Gmch 32, Shanidev Academic Eng Medium, Northeast Today, Auto Arts, Hotel Sahara Star, Siddharth Technocrats, Research Pacific India, Value Consulting, Grace Toyota, Techmantra Eng Pvt Ltd, Gndu Rc Sultanpur Lodhi, Dxc Technology (An Hp Company), Gokul Devarajan, 29E Networks Pvt Ltd Jaipur, Adv Shaheer Sing And Associates.

placements.overview:
Gyanarthi Media College is a private institute, established in 2015 in Kashipur, Uttarakhand. Gyanarthi Media College offers a total of 7 courses at UG and PG levels in 1 specialisation such as Fashion Design. Furthermore, it offer courses such as B.Sc., M.Sc., B.A., BFA and M.A. in Full Time mode. It offers courses, in streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design, Mass Communication & Media and Animation. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Gyanarthi Media College offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Mass Communication & Media. At the UG stage, courses available include B.Sc., B.A. and BFA. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.Sc. and M.A.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gyanarthi Media College offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Design and Mass Communication & Media. At the UG stage, courses available include B.Sc., B.A. and BFA. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.Sc. and M.A.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: If you want to get into media line, get this course now.

review_content.Placements: According to me, about 70% of students got placed even before the completion of the course. There are many top known recruiting companies like India Today Network, etc. There are a lot of internship opportunities in the college. I am working as an intern from 3 semester onwards and now I am in the 6th semester.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are playgrounds for cricket, basketball, and tennis. There are computer labs, studio room, radio station room, monthly newspapers, library, and classrooms that are fully air-conditioning. There are air-conditioners, leads, lights, invertors, projectors, green boards, elegant furniture, etc., separately in every class.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college in Uttarakhand.

review_content.Placements: The placement rate of Gyanarthi Media College is 100%. Every student of Gyanarthi Media College got placed with good salary packages. Gyanarthi Media College also provides an internship opportunity for every student. The main motive of Gyanarthi Media College is to provide students with a good career along with a degree.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are well-equipped. The library holds an exhaustive collection of books, magazine and other articles related not just to the fashion industry but many other aspects. There is also a hostel facility for both girls and boys.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: The college stands above its expectations.

review_content.Placements: Our college offers almost 100% placements. But students who leave their jobs mid-term are not subjected to this privilege. Most of the students get placed in Dainik Jagran as reporters and interns either at Noida or Dehradun. Students also get placed as an assistant professor in Dehradun.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a huge sports ground, a library, well-maintained computer lab, and auditorium. Each classroom is equipped with green boards and projectors. All the technical equipment like cameras and machines, etc., are provided here. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Discourses are organised regularly. They also organise trips to different parts of India.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: This is the best college for making a perfect career and to get success in life.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage of Gyanarthi is 100%. Since the day it was established, every single student of Gyanarthi got placed. Some students got placed in media houses, and some are working in event companies. Some are the best graphic designers, and some are in many other roles. Being a fresher, their first salary package is good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is amazing. It has well-structured and air-conditioning classrooms. Our college also provides Wi-Fi facility to all students. There is a computer lab where students who do not have a laptop can work. There are two huge playgrounds along with proper cricket ground, net volleyball court, and badminton court. There are indoor games like table tennis, chess, ludo, etc. There is a library with an amazing collection of books. It has a proper medical facility too.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Gyanarthi Media College in Uttarakhand For B.Com Fashion Course Information.

review_content.Placements: In this college are organised placement for the companies. In this college are provide best package the highest package is 8 Lacs and the lowest package is 4 Lacs yearly package provide. This course for admission is 12th passing percentage are 60 percent required.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college infrastructure quality are very good provide and sue high quality of product. In this college hostel facility are available but it takes extra charges on the feels. This college are many facilities provide such as Classroom, Bathroom, one Badroom in 2 student, Fast Wi-Fi connection, Library, Labs, gym etc. Facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Animation and Design - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the facilities and sports and good in placement.

review_content.Placements: About 70% are placed in top companies. The highest package is about 32 lakh per annum, and the minimum is 7 lakh per annum. Top recruiting companies include Tata, Ambuja, etc. 60% of students got internships in top and reputable companies. Most of the time in my course, the role offered is management.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are well-equipped; all the infrastructure is available for our course, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, and medical facilities. One of the best things is our sports court for basketball; I just love it. The quality of food is average, but education and sports are well-maintained.

admission_overview.college_name: Gyanarthi Media College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: The Gyanarthi Media College admission process is mostly merit-based. To get a seat, students need to go through all the steps as per guidelines. Gyanarthi Media College offers UG and PG level courses. Candidates are shortlisted for the programmes based on their academic merit and past academic scores. The process starts with registration.

courses_data.name: Gyanarthi Media College B.A. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Gyanarthi Media College B.A.is offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.A. programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 3 years programme.

highlights.summary:
The NEET MDS 2026 application process has commenced for KSR Educational Institutions admission to the MDS course, with Mar 30, 2026, being the last date to register. Also, the NEET MDS exam 2026 is going to be held on May 2, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the KSR Educational Institutions:

student_insights.feedback: Offered every semester
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in India
Organized & proactive placement process
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

faqs.answer: A:    KSR Educational Institutions has placed its selected students in known and reputed companies such as Linpack Technologies Pvt Ltd, Sunshine Hydraulics,  3D Logic, Genaaue Engineering, Deloitte And Touche Assurancr Enterprise Risk And Services India Pvt Ltd, Green Ripples Pvt Ltd, Amazon Transpotaion, L T Patil And Sons, Indusnet Techshu, Aahar.
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters from KSR Educational Institutions when it comes to placements?

faqs.answer: A:    KSR Educational Institutions offers median package range of INR 592,744 during in-campus placements. It has a decent placement assistance programme and has been rated 3.6 on placements as per Shiksha verified reviews by students.
faqs.question: What is the median package offered at KSR Educational Institutions during placements?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: KSR Educational Institutions is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, B.Sc. and BCA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and M.Sc. The fee structure for the KSR Educational Institutions programmes is around INR 4,000 to 21,00,000.

faqs.answer: Courses offerred by KSR Educational Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE, DCI. The combined seats available for courses offered at KSR Educational Institutions goes up to 2644.
faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available for various courses offered at KSR Educational Institutions?

faqs.answer: Here are some details about the TNEA cutoff for KSR Educational Institutions: The cutoff rank for MBA admission in 2024 was 3902 for the General AI quota candidates. The provisional allotment for BE/BTech courses for the TNEA SCA to SA Conversion Counselling 2024 has been released. Candidates can download their allotment order from the official website. KSR Educational Institutions accepts TNEA counselling. To be eligible for the Tamil Nadu Engineering Admission (TNEA), candidates must have completed the 12th grade. Candidates with Tamil Nadu diplomas can apply for lateral entry admission to B.Tech. To qualify for this, candidates must have completed a three-year engineering Diploma after class 10.

overview_faqs.question: Is KSR Educational Institutions a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: KSR Educational Institutions is a reputed institute for B.Ed, B.Tech, B.Com, After 1th Diploma, B.A., M.A., M.Sc., B.Sc., BBA, BCA, M.Ed, M.Com, BDS, MDS, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Teaching & Education, Engineering, Accounting & Commerce, Humanities & Social Sciences, Science, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Design, Mass Communication & Media, Medicine & Health Sciences. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. KSR Educational Institutions has a review rating of 3.9 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 3.6 on placements, 3.8 on faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: KSR Educational Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (AI and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied, because the highest salary package is provided.

content.Placements: In my course, 95% of students are placed. 29LPA is the highest salary package offered, 6LPA is the average salary package offered, and 3.8LPA is the lowest salary package offered. TCS, Accenture, Wipro, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Colan Tech, Zoho, Dxc Technology, its all top recruiting companies, 90% of students got internship, mostly fresher roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: More than 100000 books are currently in my college library. In every single classroom, having a separate projector is very useful for easy learning. The hostel food is very hygienic. Weekly thrice non veg is provided. The college bus is free for all day scholars.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Actually satisfied because of some faculty, good placements in 2024, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Above 99% of students are placed. The highest package is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 1.5 LPA. The Varsha Biotech company hired 10 students from our department, and 15 internships were secured in the Progen Biotechnology company. The top role offered in the course is developing a research person.
content.Infrastructure: Campus has pretty decent infrastructure. Classrooms are clean and have proper Wi-Fi and projectors. Labs are well-equipped, and the library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostels are comfortable, and Wi-Fi works fine. The mess food is okay, not great, but manageable. Sports facilities like basketball, football, and indoor games are available. Medical help is also there when needed. Overall, it's a good environment to study and live in.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My college is good for my career.

content.Placements: Last year, more than 90 % of students got placed in highly reputed companies. The highest package is 9 LPA, and the lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Mahendra, and Ashok Leyland. More than 70% of students got internships from the company. Top roles are designer, manufacturing sectors.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in our hostel. Hostel food is good and hygienic. Wi-Fi is available. The library is available from 9am to 9 pm. The swimming pool is available for hostel students. Medical facilities are available at any emergency inside our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am currently in my first year and enjoy studying happily.

content.Placements: They offer excellent placement opportunities. In my department, a senior secured a position at TCS. The highest package is 10 lakhs per annum, while the lowest package at BOSCH is 5.5 lakhs per annum. Most students hold positions as HR managers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well-constructed and creates a wonderful environment. They provide excellent Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The food is of high quality and very hygienic. I enjoy eating all types of non-vegetarian foods. I am interested in running, and they provide me with great opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. Computer Science and Business Systems - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I enjoyed staying and studying here.

content.Placements: In the placement, 92.5% of the students are placed. The highest package is 12 lacs per annum and the lowest package is 3.5 lacs per annum, then the average package is 5.5 lacs per annum. In my department, more students are placed in TCS and Tech Mahindra.
content.Infrastructure: We have a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The computer laboratory is connected to Wi-Fi. The classroom is very neat. Management provides very good. They provide sports coaching in the morning and evening. The hostel facilities are well and good. They provide non-veg which is very tasty and has quantity. They provide hospital facilities are emergency conditions.

admission_overview.college_name: KSR Educational Institutions Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: KSR Educational Institutions admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Science and Teaching and Education.KSR Educational Institutionsadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, NEET, and NEET MDS. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 4,000 - 21,00,000for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 5 years.

faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at KSR Educational Institutions?
faqs.answer: Courses offerred by KSR Educational Institutions are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE, DCI. The combined seats available for courses offered at KSR Educational Institutions goes up to 2644.

faqs.question: What is the schedule for TNEA Counselling at SRM Easwari Engineering College?
faqs.answer: TNEA Rank List for various categories is out on the official website of TNEA. To check ranks candidates must login using the username and password. Grievances Redressal option is available till June. Further, the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE) Tamil Nadu released TNEA counselling dates and details. Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) counselling registrations are ongoing, whereas the general TNEA Counselling process will start in July.TNEA counselling process includes registration, assignment of random numbers, certificate verifications, rank list publication, and finally the counselling. The counselling rounds will include steps like Choice Filling, Allotment, Confirmation of Allotment, and Reporting to the College/ TFC and payment of fees depending upon their confirmation.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in KSR Educational Institutions for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer: KSR Educational Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.EdCandidates passed graduation from recognised university or institution are eligible to apply.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed Diploma in Engineering in relevant stream from a recognised University.B.ComCandidates must have passed 10+2 with Commerce or Accountancy or Mathematics or Business Mathematics or Computer Science or Statistics or Business Statistics as one of the subjects or an examination from a recognised board.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class (SSLC/Matriculation) examination or equivalent qualification from any recognised board/council.B.A.Candidate must have passed in class 10+2 from a recognised board.M.A.Candidates must have passed any Bachelor degree of this University or any Bachelor degree of any Other University from any recognised Institute/ University.M.Sc.Candidates must have passed graduation B.Sc., Mathematics / B.Sc.,

faqs: What are the courses available at KSR Educational Institutions with TNEA cutoff rank up to 150000?
description: KSR Educational Institutions cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the KSR Educational Institutions cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

KSR Educational Institutions TANCET cutoff 2025 is out for admission to the MCA course. The Round 1 cutoff for MCA admission is 2458 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 1479; whereas in 2023, the cutoff rank stood at 2320 for the General AI quota. reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied, because the highest salary package is provided.
reviews.review_text: More than 100000 books are currently in my college library. In every single classroom, having a separate projector is very useful for easy learning. The hostel food is very hygienic. Weekly thrice non veg is provided. The college bus is free for all day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: Actually satisfied because of some faculty, good placements in 2024, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Campus has pretty decent infrastructure. Classrooms are clean and have proper Wi-Fi and projectors. Labs are well-equipped, and the library is quiet with a good book collection. Hostels are comfortable, and Wi-Fi works fine. The mess food is okay, not great, but manageable. Sports facilities like basketball, football, and indoor games are available. Medical help is also there when needed. Overall, it's a good environment to study and live in.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for my career.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in our hostel. Hostel food is good and hygienic. Wi-Fi is available. The library is available from 9am to 9 pm. The swimming pool is available for hostel students. Medical facilities are available at any emergency inside our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am currently in my first year and enjoy studying happily.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-constructed and creates a wonderful environment. They provide excellent Wi-Fi throughout the campus. The food is of high quality and very hygienic. I enjoy eating all types of non-vegetarian foods. I am interested in running, and they provide me with great opportunities.

reviews.review_heading: I enjoyed staying and studying here.
reviews.review_text: We have a fully Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The computer laboratory is connected to Wi-Fi. The classroom is very neat. Management provides very good. They provide sports coaching in the morning and evening. The hostel facilities are well and good. They provide non-veg which is very tasty and has quantity. They provide hospital facilities are emergency conditions.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy here. As per my suggestion, this college gives a great future.
reviews.review_text: My college looks like a green environment. They provide smart classrooms as a learning pathway for understanding concepts for the students easily. For the students, they provide a safe transport to reach home every day. They provide a specific laboratory for department-oriented facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the right place for improving skills and career, because of the advanced placement training.
reviews.review_text: Our campus always looks lush green, which gives it a look. More facilities are provided by the college, which are very useful for our career development. A hostel provides good and tasty food and an exciting menu.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has all the basic amenities that a college should have.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good. Classrooms and other facilities, like labs and the idea lab to share our ideas and make an impact. The library is very useful because there are Readers Club and the Women Empowerment Club, like so on. Extracurricular activities like NCC, NSS, and other sports are encouraged here.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. It conducts many events and sports for students.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus. The hostel food is very good. The hostel warden is strict and helpful for students. The college is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely disappointed with the placement during my batch 2022.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure, but the hostel will be average, and food will be okay only. Not much good. The facility in the hostel is also not much good, and the faculty and the way they treat us is also not good. Coming to food, is one of the worst experiences; otherwise, infrastructure, labs, and other things are really good.

reviews.review_heading: Placements need improvement. Canteen lacks variety, and bus services are poor.
reviews.review_text: Sports and extracurricular activities are much better than in other colleges, but the faculty members are local people with more egos. The faculty members are treating students with partiality. The management of hostels is good, and the mess is available with a variety of offers. The canteen needs to improve with more variety in food, and medical facilities should be much better. We have a dental block on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Students who selected KSR Educational Institution, their life is of full value and gain a better lif
reviews.review_text: KSR Educational Institutions holds a total of 15 colleges inside the institute. Infrastructure is beautiful. Wi-Fi is freely available in our college. Hospital and hostel are full of safety and security. The food is 100% safe and healthy, and 6 canteens are open at all times.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. The food is good. Classrooms are good with good facilities. The mess, canteen, and medical facilities are good. Other facilities are also good. Facilities and infrastructure available in our department are Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it’s a good college for you to place in a reputed company.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. They provide many display halls to display their projects and review them. In our college, our hostel has good facilities and is cleanly maintained by the cleaners. The food in our hostel is good enough and daily has a different menu.

reviews.review_heading: "KSR College" Empowering students through quality education and community.
reviews.review_text: KSR College offers infrastructure for both courses and hostel accommodation. The classrooms are well-equipped, promoting an effective learning environment. Hostels provide comfortable living with essential amenities, ensuring students feel at home. The campus is clean and well-maintained, fostering a positive atmosphere. Overall, it's a conducive place for both academic and personal growth.

college_info.intro:
Indian Institute of Gems and Jewellery, Jaipur popular programmes are BDes and PG diploma. BDes students are taught the designing of jewellery, understanding materials, trends, jewellery concepts, cultural understanding, marketing, innovation, Business and trade and the value and supply chain. The students are taught with an overall spectrum of entire process knowledge from the idea to the jewellery selling. There are various career opportunities available for students such as Jewellery Designing, Product Development, and others.
Indian Institute of Gems and Jewellery, Jaipur students can work as Merchandisers, Jewellery Designers, or can take up various job opportunities relevant to their field. admission_overview.college_name: Indian Institute of Gems and Jewellery, Jaipur Admission 2025 (Open): Courses, Eligibility, Application Process, Dates

paragraphs: IIGJ Jaipur admissionis open. Indian Institute of Gems and Jewellery, popularly known asIIGJ Jaipuroffers UG, Diploma, and Certificate programmes. It offers courses in different specialisations, including Jewellery Manufacturing & Production, Gem Identification, Jewellery Design, Computer-Aided Jewellery Design & Production and more. The Institute is affiliated toRajasthan ILD Skills University (RISU). It is a training partner of the National Skill Development Corporation (NSDC) and the Rajasthan Skill and Livelihoods Development Corporation (RSLDC) and is promoted by the Gems & Jewellery Export Promotion Council, GoI.IIGJ Jaipuradmissionis direct/merit-based. More details about the course admission atIIGJ Jaipurare provided in the following sections.

The Institute offers admission through an online mode. Candidates, who meet the given eligibility criteria, need to register online for the completeIIGJ Jaipur admission process. Mentioned below are the course-wise eligibility and selection details:

Candidates seeking admission can apply by filling out the admission form. Before applying, aspirants must check that they are fulfilling the required minimum selection criteria. Each of theIIGJ Jaipur course admissionstages are further explained below:
STEP 1: IIGJ Jaipur Application Process 2025

Eligible students can visit the institute's official website (https://iigjjaipur.com/) to apply. All the details in the application form should be filled out carefully and as per the official documentation.
STEP 2: Shortlisting of Students
The institute scans the applications to ensure applicants meet the applied course selection criteria. These shortlisted students further become eligible for admission.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates can further pay the required fee amount to confirm their seat.

courses_data.name: IIGJ Jaipur Certificate Courses Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Apart from the degree courses, it also offers diploma and certificate programmes in more than 10 specialisations. The duration of these programmes varies from course-to-course. Admission to all these programmes is done on merit basis. The final selection of candidates is based on the HSC scores. The Institute offers two diploma programmes in Jewellery Design and Gem Identification. After the completion of these courses, students will get an opportunity to work as Jewellery Merchandiser, Design Interpreter, Mid-level Process Manager, Production Supervisors, Gemologists, Gemstone Assorter and more. The Institute offers short-term certificate courses with a duration of up to five months. These courses are majorly offered in four streams, namely Computer-Aided Design, Gem Identification, Jewellery Manufacturing & Production and Gemstone Cutting & Polishing. Any candidate, who has completed Class 12, can apply for any of the certificate courses. The final selection of candidates is based on the marks secured in the Class 12 exam.

courses_data.name: IIGJ Jaipur UG Diploma Admission 2025
courses_data.description: At the UG level, IIGJ Jaipur offers a four-year BDes programme in Jewellery Design. The course is divided into semester patterns. For admission to this course, the aspirant should have passed Class 12. After completing this course, students can make a career as a jewellery merchandiser, design coordinator, visual merchandiser, etc.

faqs.question: What all courses are offered by IIGJ Jaipur?
faqs.answer: The Institute offers UG, Diploma and certificate programmes in various specialisations of Jewellery Design. Admission to the offered courses is merit-based. Aspirants must fulfil the eligibility requirement to get a seat.

faqs.question: How much is the fee for IIGJ Jaipur courses?
faqs.answer: After the selection, students are required to pay some amount of the total fee for seat confirmation. The fee varies for each course/specialisation. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for Diploma and certificate courses at IIGJ Jaipur?
faqs.answer: Admission to Diploma and certificate programmes is done on a merit-basis. The final selection of candidates is based on the marks secured in the qualifying exam. Students applying for certificate and UG Diploma courses should have passed Class 12 to become eligible for admissiom.

The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. review_content.Placements: In the previous years, more than 70 percent of the students were placed from our college. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the lowest package is around 2 LPA. The average package is around 5 LPA. More than 50 percent of students secure internships in top companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge library of our college called the central library, which contains numerous books for students related to academic and non-academic. Food is good.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

paragraphs:
Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theShri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashramapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG, After 10th and Doctorate programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Humanities and Social Sciences and Science, and more. To know about the eligibility of Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram courses, students can visit the website.

Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram admission:

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: What is the latest expected JEE Main cutoff for the year?

description: Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 148310 and 283088 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 148310, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 192928.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 148310.

hostel_campus.college_name: Shri Neminath Jain Bhhramcharyashram Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: SNJB civil branch review.
reviews.review_text: In our department, each classroom contains a smart board for visual learning of the graphic subject. Wi-Fi is also available. The central library is very useful for the students. Hostels are well-hygienic. Food quality is acceptable. An on-campus medical facility is also available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied because the college infrastructure and teaching quality are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available throughout the college. Labs are well designed with all important equipment. Classrooms are well designed for a study environment. Library contains a variety of books. Hostel food is good. The canteen provides well hygienic snacks.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of teachers, facilities, and management team of the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various facilities. The infrastructure of our college is well-designed with new ideas. Department infrastructure is built as per the requirements of the course. Our college provides Wi-Fi in every corner of the college with good speed. Labs are well designed for specific subjects such as Physics and Chemistry, and others. Classroom consists of a smart board always connected with Wi-Fi to provide a quality digital learning experience to students every time. There is a huge li...

reviews.review_heading: Good greenery environment for study.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the following facilities: Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, classrooms with a digital board, and a projector. We have a central library which consists of various kinds of books for students, non-academic and academic. The food quality provided by the hostel is too good. The canteen also provides various snacks. Our college encourages students to participate in sports, cultural activities, and various games.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has a good study environment, which creates motivation to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is decent. There is a smart digital board in every classroom with Wi-Fi. The college has a huge central library containing a wide variety of books for specific courses. The mess provides tasty and good-quality food, including Jain food. Medical facilities are available for students 24/7 with a well-equipped dispensary on campus.

reviews.review_heading: My review of this college.
reviews.review_text: It was a well-structured curriculum. It obviously helps if you know exactly what field you want your career in, but they also give us one year to figure out the subjects you want to do for your major. In the long term, it doesn't matter what subjects you studied. Hostel amenities are good. Hostel rooms are spacious, and we have single and shared basis hostels. Will be provided with wardrobes, individual beds, blankets, towels, pillows, tables and chairs. Also provides laundry facilities. Mess in...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for engineering studies with average marks and income.
reviews.review_text: It is very good and very relevant in terms of the facilities and infrastructure at this college of engineering. The library, Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all top-class. The food available at the mess and canteen is so nice and tasty. For sports and games, we have a very big ground to play on.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides good facilities. The water and electricity facilities are good. The college is clean. The food served in the canteen is not good. Staff members are not good. They are not cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the degree.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities in my college are average, as the other local colleges have. Department of artificial intelligence and data Science is at very low stage in this college of engineering. Hostel facilities is such that they provide only Jain food to the students, and the non-Jain students have to eat the jain food in this hostel 
.

reviews.review_heading: The college is too good by each parameter like placements, campus life, education, safety, etc.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is fabulous; there are many engineering marvels in the college. You have to look towards our central building; it is fabulous. The classrooms are also fully digital; in each classroom, there is one digital board and comfortable benches for sitting purposes. The labs are also too good to do our job and the whole campus is fully WI-FI connected. The hostel facility is also very good; there is also a WI-FI facility is available and many other things are good about the hostel, lik...

reviews.review_heading: An honest feedback of the college.
reviews.review_text: There are different classrooms for separate batches and years. There is a separate department for M.Pharma and B.Pharma. The college has labs for practicals. There is a Library with reading books and a digital library as well. The facilities in the hostel are good. The food is very good and medical facilities are also there. They have a Gymkhana and sports facilities available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.

college_info.intro:
The flagship programmes offered at IMS Unison University Dehradun are BA LLB and MBA. Courses in IMS Dehradun are offered at UG and PG levels. IMS University Dehradun offers these programmes for a duration of 5 and 2 years, respectively with a comprehensive curriculum.
These courses are highly sought after among students for their placements and future careers with the IMUU BA LLB programme being a great starting point for any student who wish to build a career in Law whether it be Advocacy, Legal Journalism, Corporate Law, Auditing, etc.
While the MBA programme can lead to attractive placements with IMS Unison University MBA graduates being highly attractive for companies looking to fill leadership roles whether it be in Sales, Marketing, Consulting, Real Estate, etc.
The fees for these courses ranges between INR 1.7 Lakhs and INR 2.18 Lakhs annually with IMS Dehradun MBA fees ranging from INR 3.8 Lakhs and INR 4.14 Lakhs annually. Interested students can check out some of the other IMS Unison University popular courses below:

faqs.answer: The admission criteria start in IMS University by filling registration form and by qualify eligibilty criteria for particular course.Admission to BBA, Integrated BBA-MBA, B.Com (Hons), MHM, and MA in English degrees is based on performance in the qualifying test and a personal interview.In the case of BA, BA (Hons), BHM, and MA in Journalism & Mass Communication, the institute considers the entrance exam score in addition to merit and interview.Obtaining admission to the Integrated BBA programme.BA and LLB (Hons).LLB (Hons) admission is based on merit, CLAT/LSAT scores, and a personal interview.While LLM admission is based on the University Admission Test/CLAT score and PI.Candidates for MBA are chosen based on their performance in the Aptitude Test and PI.Candidates interested in pursuing the University's Ph.D degree must have a valid score in the NET/SLET/SET, IUU Admission Test, and PI.The performance in the Personal Interview phase determines the ultimate selection for all courses.And to get the most updated eligibilty criteria please visit the official website of the IMS Unison University.If you qualify the all eligibilty criteria related to particular course in which you want to enroll and then you can easily join IMS Unison University.

faqs.answer: Yes, BBA LLB (Hons) is a? ve-year integrated semester-based law course. Candidates can pursue the course after completing Class 12. An aspirant will become a graduate in Management as well as Law after completing this course. The curriculum is designed to incorporate the study of law with the ever-growing demands of the corporate sector and to familiarise the students with the legal aspect of the business world. Along with the study of subjects of law, the course also offers subjects like Principles of Management, Business Environment, Managerial Economics, and Management Accounting, etc. Click here to know more about the BBA LLB (Hons) course.

faqs.answer: IMS Unison University in Dehradun is a good option for MBA. According to the information available on Shiksha, almost 97% of the students from the MBA programme got placed in the previous year, and the placements are good. The MBA programme is the flagship programme of the School of Management and offers a rigorous and crafted curriculum in active collaboration with expert academicians and practitioners. The programme is designed to equip strategic, leadership, and business skills to enable students to take up positions of higher responsibility in a variety of management settings. Students are offered the option of specializations such as Marketing, Finance, Human Resource Management, Operations, International Business, Business Intelligence & Data Analytics, Information Technology, Retail Management, Logistics & Supply Chain Management, and Entrepreneurship. The programme also includes rigorous internships that provide students with practical experience.
faqs.question: Q: Is IMS Unison University good for MBA?

After the application process, the university considers the eligibility of the candidates and releases a merit list with the names of shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling and document verification. Candidates need to pay a fee to confirm their seat in the university.

content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure of my college are good. For my course, the classrooms are good. They don't provide any Wi-Fi service in the classroom. Facilities of hostels are not up to the mark. The quality of food is average. Sports and games facilities are not good enough.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Dehradun pride - IMS Unison University.

content.Placements: The percentage of students placed in the course is around 200 students, divided into 6 sections. The lowest package is 8 LPA, and the highest salary is 16 LPA to 17 LPA. The students get internships at companies like Nykaa, Wipro, and many more. The offered course are very advanced such as AI.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities such as Wi-Fi are provided in hostels and labs. Labs are fully working with new computers and the library has lots of books that match our needs. The food in canteen and hostel is very good and tasty. We even have basketball and volleyball courts to play.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A comprehensive review of the BBA course at IMS.

content.Placements: The university has a strong placement record, with a good percentage of students securing jobs before they graduate. On average, 80-90% of BBA students are placed in reputed companies through the university placement drive. The average salary package for BBA graduates at IMS Unison University typically ranges from 3-5 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms at IMS Unison University are clean and well-maintained. Regular cleaning and maintenance are carried out to ensure a hygienic environment in the hostels. Common rooms for socializing, Wi-Fi access, and recreational spaces are available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) (Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good and it provides every facility needed by the students.

content.Placements: Over 50% of students were placed at IMS unison university. The highest package offered is 30 LPA and the lowest is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Deloitte, Amazon, Flipkart etc. The top roles offered are manager, HR manager, sales recruiter, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good and every floor is Wi-Fi enabled. Elevators are also provided in every building. The hostel rooms are sufficient for 2 people to live in. The food in the mess is hygienic. Sports facilities like badminton, cricket etc, are also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is good and you also get the nature.

content.Placements: About 35% of students got placed. The highest package I have seen is 40 LPA, and the lowest I have seen is 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Amazon and Flipkart. In our course, only 35% of students got placed in companies like Amazon, ICICI, Marriott, etc. Top roles are offered as legal head, chief legal officer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: All the classrooms are well cleaned and hi-tech. All classes have a smart board. All classes have CCTV and full campus is covered with college Wi-Fi. We have a special moot court room for practice. Canteen is too good and all the food is delicious and fresh. We have a basketball court and a badminton court.

IMS Unison University Application Process 2026

courses_data.description: IMS Unison University offers a two-year MBA course at the PG level. Candidates who have completed graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate can apply for MBA. Admission to the MBA course is based on merit and performance of the aspirants in the PI round. There are a total of 360 seats in MBA.

faqs.question: How to get admission to MBA course offered at IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: MBA Dual Specialisation is a two-year course offered at the PG level. Admission to this course is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam and PI round. Candidates must pass graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% in case of candidates belonging to SC/ ST/ Uttarakhand OBC category) to apply for MBA course.

faqs.question: How many seats are there in MBA at IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: IMS Unison University has a total of360 seatsin MBA programme. The university offers seats to candidates in MBA programme baed on their merit. Candidates must complete graduation in any discipline with a least 60% aggregate to apply for MBA.

faqs.question: How can candidates join IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: The admission criteria start in IMS University by filling registration form and by qualify eligibilty criteria for particular course.Admission to BBA, Integrated BBA-MBA, B.Com (Hons), MHM, and MA in English degrees is based on performance in the qualifying test and a personal interview.In the case of BA, BA (Hons), BHM, and MA in Journalism & Mass Communication, the institute considers the entrance exam score in addition to merit and interview.Obtaining admission to the Integrated BBA programme

faqs.question: What is the mode of application at IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: The mode of application at IMS Unison University Dehradun is online with students able to apply through the institute page. Students should make sure they meet correct course eligibility before applying. Students must also pay application fees of up to INR 1250.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BA at IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: Candidates must pass Class 12 examination with a minimum of 45% aggregate and English as a subject to apply for BA/ BA (Hons) at IMS Unison University. There is a relaxation of 5% in the aggregate for candidates belonging to SC/ ST/ OBC category candidates of Uttarakhand.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BA in Media, Communication and Design at IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: IMS Unison University offers admission to BA/ BA (Hons) Media, Communication and Design based on merit of the candidates. The selection is based on Class 12 scores of the applicants. Once selected, aspirants need to confirm their seat by paying the course fees.

faqs.question: Do I have to pay application fees for IMS Unison University admissions?
faqs.answer: Yes, students must pay an application/ registration fee of INR 1250 while applying for IMS Unison University Dehradun admissions through the university admission portal of IUU Uttarakhand. This fee can be paid online through Net Banking while candidates are applying for their preferred course.

faqs.question: Are entrance exams required by IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: Currently admissions at IMS Unison University does not require any outside entrance exams though admissions to the different courses requires merit in General Aptitude Tests conducted by the University as well as Personal Interview rounds. While PhD admissions requires IUU admission test which is also conducted by the university.

faqs.question: How to get admission to IMS Unison University courses?
faqs.answer: Admission to LLM and PhD is based on entrance exam. For admission to all the other courses, merit in the last qualifying exam is considered. After the application process, the university considers the eligibility of the candidates and releases a merit list with the names of shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted aspirants are called for counselling and document verification. Candidates need to pay a fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Can I join IMS Unison University directly?
faqs.answer: Participate in the admission process to be considered for admission to IMS Unison University. The institute offers UG and PG degree courses under different schools: Law, Mass Communication, Hospitality Management, Computers Applications etc.Fill the registration form and the application form online on the official website. The eligibility criteria for the courses vary, and selection is either merit-based or entrance-based.

faqs.question: Is PI round compulsory at IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: IMS Unison University offers admission to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants who are selected are further called for a personal interview. Candidates who clear all the selection rounds are only offered admission in the university. The PI round is conducted by a panel of internal and external experts.

faqs.question: What is the application fee for IMS Unison University courses?
faqs.answer: Students must pay an application fee for admission to IMS Unison University Dehradun courses. The application fee is usually INR 1250 for most courses. Though students may have extra fees for admissions, registration, etc.

placement_report.college_name: IMS Unison University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: IMS Unison University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The complete placement details for the Class of 2025 are yet to be released on the offcial website. As of now, 204 companies visited the campus for 2025 placements, of which 121 offered final placements. The remaining 83 companies provided internship opportunities to the students.

The University has achieved 95% placements in the academic year 2023-24. The highest and average package offered during IMS Unison University placements 2024 was INR 16 LPA and INR 5.86 LPA . More than 400 recruiters took part in the placement season 2024. Some of the top recruiters of IMS Unison University include Audi, Sony, Berger Paints and Times of India.

faqs.question: Is IMS Unison University good for placements?
faqs.answer: IMS Unison University offers good annual placements for various courses like BTech, MBA, BBA, etc. As per the latest report, 204 companies visited the campus for 2025 placements, of which 121 offered final placements. The remaining 83 companies provided internship opportunities to the students. Earlier, the highest and average package secured by the batch 2024 was INR 16 LPA and INR 5.86 LPA.

faqs.question: How are the BBA placements at IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: IMS Unison University is well known for its BBA and MBA placements. It offers good placements every year for BBA and MBA courses. The course-wise placement data is yet to be released by the University on the official website. Once it is released, the BBA and MBA placement details will be updated here. Meanwhile, check out the overall key highlights of IMS Dehradun placements for the batch 2024 in the table below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) Placement rate 95% Highest package INR 16 LPA Average package INR 5.86 LPA Total recruiters 400

faqs.question: Are there any govt. job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Com from IMS Unison University?
faqs.answer: Yes, after completing a BCom degree from IMS Unison University, graduates are eligible to apply for various government job roles, check out the various job fields below: Civil Services—BCom graduate students can prepare for UPSC exams; subjects like Finance, Accounting and Economics provide a strong base for preparation. State Public Service Commission- Each state has its public service exam for which BCom graduates can easily apply. The names of SPSC exams are UPPSC, BPSC, etc. Staff Selection Commission- The SSC CGL (Combined Graduate Level) exam recruits for various positions such as Income Tax Officer. Customs officers, etc. A bachelor's graduate qualifies for these exams.

hostel_campus.college_name: IMS Unison University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University offers separate in-campus hostels for boys and girls. The hostels are specially designed with two primary objectives of safety and comfort. They have round-the-clock security, with stringent security procedures and comfortable apartments that students enjoy living in. Besides easy access to library and computer facilities, the hostel facilities include amenities like television, table-tennis tables, water filters and coolers, gym, coffee vending machines as well as washing machines.

library.description: The library has a rich collection of over 47,000 learning resources in the discipline of management, computer science, mass communication, law and other related areas. It also possesses a very rich collection of e-books, e-journals, and online databases such as EBSCO - Business Source Elite Full text has more than 22,00 journals, company profiles, industry reports, and market research reports, communication and mass media complete cover indexing and abstracts for more than 620 journals, full text for over 500 journals and EBSCO e-Books academic collection of over 1,18,000 titles. The library is also a member of Computer Society of India (CSI) and Developing Library Network (DELNET) for sharing the resource among its member libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Review of my college life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of my college are good. For my course, the classrooms are good. They don't provide any Wi-Fi service in the classroom. Facilities of hostels are not up to the mark. The quality of food is average. Sports and games facilities are not good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Dehradun pride - IMS Unison University.
reviews.review_text: The facilities such as Wi-Fi are provided in hostels and labs. Labs are fully working with new computers and the library has lots of books that match our needs. The food in canteen and hostel is very good and tasty. We even have basketball and volleyball courts to play.

reviews.review_heading: A comprehensive review of the BBA course at IMS.
reviews.review_text: The hostel rooms at IMS Unison University are clean and well-maintained. Regular cleaning and maintenance are carried out to ensure a hygienic environment in the hostels. Common rooms for socializing, Wi-Fi access, and recreational spaces are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and it provides every facility needed by the students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and every floor is Wi-Fi enabled. Elevators are also provided in every building. The hostel rooms are sufficient for 2 people to live in. The food in the mess is hygienic. Sports facilities like badminton, cricket etc, are also provided.

reviews.review_heading: College is good and you also get the nature.
reviews.review_text: All the classrooms are well cleaned and hi-tech. All classes have a smart board. All classes have CCTV and full campus is covered with college Wi-Fi. We have a special moot court room for practice. Canteen is too good and all the food is delicious and fresh. We have a basketball court and a badminton court.

reviews.review_heading: Details review of IMS unison University.
reviews.review_text: IMS Unison University has modern and well-equipped classrooms with projectors and other digital teaching aids. The campus has a good library where almost all academic resources are present. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It offers a hostel facility for separate boys and girls where students have to pay fees of Rs. 80,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: A comprehensive review of the BBA Honours program at IMS Unison University.
reviews.review_text: Campus is equipped with high-speed internet connectivity to support academic and research activities. Facilities are well maintained providing a conducive environment for both studying and relaxation. Hostel provides good quality food with a variety of options  including both vegetarian and non vegetarian meals.

reviews.review_heading: Management of IMS Unison University.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled with high-speed internet for students. Classrooms are air-conditioned rooms with projectors and audio systems for interactive teaching. We also have a big library with over 40,000 books, online resources, and journals.

reviews.review_heading: There are the best faculty members at IMS UNISON.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are awesome. College provides free internet. Facilities are available such as labs, library, and canteen. The quality of food at the hostel is good. Our college also has medical facilities in case of any injury.

reviews.review_heading: Placements of IMS Unison University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel of the college are good. Our college provides free internet connection on campus and in libraries. The food served in the hostel is good. The campus is nice. The campus is small, but the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: IMS unison University review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, and the furniture is of premium quality. The Wi-Fi is reliable, and the libraries are well maintained. The college hosts a sports week event that provides opportunities for many students.

reviews.review_heading: Best return on investment university for BBA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good libraries are avail on weekdays in the daytime with a strict dress code and classrooms are very well furnished. Wi-Fi is available but they don't work properly at all so that's an issue. Food is good in hostels including facilities like laundry, gym, general medical facilities, two cafes within the campus and four-time meals.

reviews.review_heading: One can enjoy the best college life here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is not much bigger in comparison to other universities, but the location of the college makes it different from other colleges. Mussorie is just 20 kilometers away from the college, providing great weather the whole year. Classrooms are well-equipped. The college has two libraries: one for the law department and the other for the central library for every department. Computer labs and media labs for mass communication students are there. A moot court hall for la...

reviews.review_heading: Good for under graduation in terms of infrastructure and facilities .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really good as compared to others, with all the professional, ventilated and modern classrooms. The library is well maintained with AC and Wi-Fi. The hostel rules are quite strict, but the facilities—food, Wi-Fi, sports, and garden area—are really good. Only vegetarian food is served and it's taste can be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Life at IMS Unison University .
reviews.review_text: I don't personally like the infrastructure of our college, but we are provided with a lot of other facilities. There are two libraries on the campus, and we even have Wi-Fi in every building, which is a great thing. There is a cafeteria as well as a food truck inside the campus.

paragraphs: Candidates must apply for the course of their choice as a first step. The institute selects candidates for admission based on their merit in the entrance exam or qualifying exam. Below is the step-wise NIMR Mumbai admission process:
STEP 1: NIMR Mumbai Application Process 2025
Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply online on the official website of the institute. Aspirants first need to choose a course and then fill the form.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the registration is over, the institute evaluates the applications of the candidates. Admission to all courses except MBA is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The institute considers the Management entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation
Selected candidates are informed about their admission. They need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the institute.

NIMR offers courses at multiple levels. The fee that candidates need to pay varies course-wise. Candidates need to pay tuition fees every year to continue their courses. Below is the course-wiseNIMR Mumbai fee:

faqs.question: Can I apply at NIMR Mumbai with 60% in Class 12?
faqs.answer: The eligibility criteria for UG courses is Class 12. NIMR Mumbai has specified the minimum aggregate for each course. The aggregate required in Class 12 is 50%. Hence, aspirants with 60% aggregate in Class 12 can apply for any of the UG programmes at NIMR.

faqs.question: Can I join National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) directly?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to first fill out the application form to register for the course of their choice at NIMR Mumbai. The institute selects candidates for most of the programmes based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Aspirants need to qualify any of the Management entrance exam such as CAT, MAT, etc. for MBA admission.

faqs.question: When can I apply for a BSc course of NIMR Mumbai?
faqs.answer: NIMR Mumbai BSc registration form is available on the official website. The eligible students can go on to the official website to register and apply. There is no application deadline available as of now. Aspirants can apply as soon as possible. The admission office can also be contacted for deadlines.

The top recruiters of National Institute of Management and Research Studies in recent past included leading companies such as Reckitt Benckiser , Viacom 18 , Ogilvy and Boston Consultancy Group.

faqs.question: Does National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) have good placements?
faqs.answer: It is true that the National Institute of Management and Research Studies (NIMR) offers quality job placements. High-end recruiters highly value the well-rounded professionals that NIMR produces and its solid reputation for delivering high-quality education. To give students plenty of options for internships and full-time jobs, the institute maintains a specialised placement cell that collaborates closely with top businesses in a range of industries. NIMR has a 90% placement rate for its graduating batches, according to the institute's official website. Numerous alumni of the school have secured positions at reputable corporations, including IBM, TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and HCL. In startups and entrepreneurial endeavors, some students have also been placed.

faqs.question: What is the highest package for MBA students at NIMR, Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The highest package for MBA students at NIMR, Mumbai was just Rs 5,85,000. the highest placement was offered by cognizant to 12 students. The placement scenerio is not good in college, it has been decreased from previous years. Some of the top recruiters at NIMR Mumbai include Ogilvy, BCG, Viacom 18, Tata Consultancy Services, Deloitte, and Ernst & Young.

faqs.question: What is the fee at NIMR Mumbai?
faqs.answer: NIMR fee varies course-wise. Candidates must pay the fee first to confirm their seat in the institute and then to continue the course. Below is course-wise NIMR Mumbai fee: Course Total Tuition Fee BBA INR 3.8 lakh MBA INR 1.5 Lacs - INR 5 lakh BSc INR 3.8 Lacs - INR 4.5 lakh B.Ed INR 1 lakh M.Ed INR 1.2 lakh Note: This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

faqs.question: How much is the BBA fee at NIMR Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for National Institute of Management and Research Studies BBA is INR 3.8 lakh . Candidates need to pay course fee after completion of the selection process to confirm their seat in the institute.

faqs.question: What is the course fees for four years BSc in NIMR Mumbai?
faqs.answer: The NIMR Mumbai course fee is cumulative of various components, such as caution money, tuition fee, and more. Some of the components are one-time chargeable, while some have to be paid annually/semester-wise. The total tuition fee is INR 4.5 lakh for BSc in Food and Nutrition course and INR 3.75 lakh for Clinical Research. This fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is however still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

reviews.review_heading: A college for efficient studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not really pleasing. When you look at the ambience and sanitation, you would not be satisfied enough with it. I personally feel when it comes to infrastructure, it is the poorest of all. The canteen area is also not really soothing, so it's not up to mark.

reviews.review_heading: BBK DAV College for Girls, Amritsar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and buildings of BBK DAV College are very nice and well-maintained. The infrastructure is very beautiful, with gardens, parks, playgrounds, and many other clubs available. The facilities provided by the hostels are also first-class.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide good infrastructure and facilities. The library is not good. Classrooms are not good in condition. The hostel facility is below average. The food served in the hostel is not good. Games are good. There is no canteen in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, good placements, good infrastructure and good facilities .
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in the course /department is good in labs, classrooms, library. Wi-fi is available also. The quality of facilities in hostel is good also. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical, sports and games faculty members are too good also.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for studies.
reviews.review_text: There is greenary all around.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good teaching staff.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a separate block for the PG department. Discipline is maintained in classrooms and outside the classrooms. Our campus is very clean. Havan is also performed daily at 8:30 AM to aware the children of Vedic culture.

reviews.review_heading: It's the best college in Amritsar with efficient faculty members. Placements are rated 10 out of 10.
reviews.review_text: Our college has fully air-conditioned labs, spacious classrooms and a sitting area. The infrastructure of the college is superb. It is the best college in Amritsar. Cafeteria, cleaning and drinking facilities are available here. The hostel provides hygienic food to students along with full security.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Amritsar to opt for computer studies.
reviews.review_text: Our college has well-equipped and maintained computer labs and libraries. You can take benefit of all the basic facilities like parking, canteens, book shop, gym and playground.

reviews.review_heading: I had the best college life.
reviews.review_text: The quality of infrastructure is well-maintained. Wi-Fi facility is available in all departments. There is open access to the library and computer labs. The hostel is quite well-maintained with good quality food. Open and free medical facilities are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the college. The teaching pedagogy is also very old fashioned.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good but the hostel is not at all good they even do not allow the students to go out even in the morning and mess food is also very bad. Although they have 3-4 canteens and food is good l. There is no Wi-Fi facility available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers were acquainted with practical knowledge of the subjects. Good and satisfactory college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college was really very nice. Classrooms were well designed and were fully ventilated. Each department was having their own labs. Library of the college was also very nice and was fully air conditioned. College was fully equipped with the advanced gadgets.

reviews.review_heading: Really good placement number. Infrastructure and facilities are also good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of college is good. Classrooms library and labs are also well structured. The hostel facility provided by college is also satisfactory. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also good. A good platform for the sports students.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure, staff and very good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good with very clean surroundings. Laboratories are very clean and big. The library is very good, and medical facilities are the best. Games are very entertaining, and I like our PT teacher. The canteen at our college is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty with great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is no AC classrooms, wi-fi facility is not provided by the college and classrooms are spacious enough according to the strength of the class. Library is quite good it contains all the books related to the course. Hostel is good and the food provided in the mess is also good in quality. The medical room is there in the campus. Gym is there in the campus itself. Canteen 's food quality is also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of very few faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the BBK DAV College for Women is good. However, the commerce department is not so good. Classrooms are small, and there is no proper ventilation. There are at least 50 students in each class. Only one washroom is available in the department. The library available is good.

placements.overview: In Nagindas Khandwala College, 1456 students admitted in year 2016-17, out of which 1061 graduated in 2018-19. From this, 57 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.261259 and 196 students got selected for higher studies. In year 2017-18, 1507 students were admitted, out of which 1239 graduated in 2019-20. From this, 64 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.220681 and 220 students got selected for higher studies. In Nagindas Khandwala College, 1682 students admitted in year 2018-19, out of which 1431 graduated in 2020-21. From this, 51 qualified students got placed with a median salary of Rs.218000 and 138 students got selected for higher studies.

student_insights.feedback: Offered in the final year only
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Students are expected to reach out to companies themselves
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Nagindas Khandwala College offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose offline courses from plethora of streams such as Business & Management Studies and Science. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Nagindas Khandwala College offers MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and M.Com.
