reviews_list.review_title: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Placement at my college is average some students get good placements while others do not. If you work hard during your college days you can maximize your package to 5 to 6 lakhs. Otherwise you might only get 1 lakh placement and even then it is not guaranteed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Media and Communication (BAMMC) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.

review_content.Placements: 60-90% of students got placed. It is average and I don't know much about media, journalism, advertisement, PR, digital content, and startups. 60-70% of students get internships in second year only, some do freelancing, etc. Roles offered are content, writers, social media manager, video creator, journalism, and graphic designer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

review_summary.college_name: Nagindas Khandwala College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the teaching but not with the placement.

content.Placements: At least 10 per cent of students were placed in my batch, and they also sent non-IT roles to the placement cell group. The package is up to 3.5 to 5 LPA, and they also send companies like Media.Net, Bigul, and customer support roles in the IT placement cell.
content.Infrastructure: The library is good, but no Wi-Fi is provided. I also found a couple in the library, which is disturbing. They should remove them from the library. The quality of food is good in the canteen, and the college also supports sports, in which I have taken part. Medical support is also provided by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great teaching technique.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest 3 LPA. Recruiting companies are Morgan Stanley, Amazon, a hospital, etc. 90 percent of students got internships. Roles offered are counselling psychologists and many others. One of my classmates got the top placement in the criminal psychology field. I believe it is important to know all the placements they provide in college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are mid-level not so good, at the same time not so bad. The hostels are not that great. The infrastructure is mid-level. I hope you visit once before going to the toilets, which are quite broken and dirty at times, the authorities don't take action at all.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Management Studies (B.M.S.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement at my college is average some students get good placements while others do not. If you work hard during your college days you can maximize your package to 5 to 6 lakhs. Otherwise you might only get 1 lakh placement and even then it is not guaranteed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts in Mass Media and Communication (BAMMC) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.

content.Placements: 60-90% of students got placed. It is average and I don't know much about media, journalism, advertisement, PR, digital content, and startups. 60-70% of students get internships in second year only, some do freelancing, etc. Roles offered are content, writers, social media manager, video creator, journalism, and graphic designer.
content.Infrastructure: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

individual_reviews.course: BBA (Hons.) in Business Administration - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for management studies.

content.Placements: I am not very aware of placements as I am still in the 3rd year of this course, but after completing the 2nd year, there are many internship opportunities, which is the best part. There are internships from different companies, including VML, Vijay Sales, and Paytm.
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very good and air-conditioned. There is also a good canteen facility. There is a gymkhana to play games and a library to study and be stress-free. They also take care of cleanliness across the whole campus, and there is an elevator facility for all students.

admission_overview.college_name: Nagindas Khandwala College Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Nagindas Khandwala College admissionis based on the exam score of the aspirants. The institute accepts scores in MAH CET, Maharashtra HSC, and Mumbai University Admission. Candidates are required to fill out the application form online at the official website of Nagindas Khandwala College. The college offers programmes in Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies, Accounting and Commerce, Design, Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science, Banking and Finance and Insurance streams.
The college offers UG courses for 2 years - 3 years. For programmes at the PG level, the duration is 2 years.

The total fee ofNagindas Khandwala Collegeincludes various components, such as caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc. Aspirants have to pay the course fee at the time of admission for seat confirmation.

hostel_campus.college_name: Nagindas Khandwala College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the teaching but not with the placement.
reviews.review_text: The library is good, but no Wi-Fi is provided. I also found a couple in the library, which is disturbing. They should remove them from the library. The quality of food is good in the canteen, and the college also supports sports, in which I have taken part. Medical support is also provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Great teaching technique.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are mid-level not so good, at the same time not so bad. The hostels are not that great. The infrastructure is mid-level. I hope you visit once before going to the toilets, which are quite broken and dirty at times, the authorities don't take action at all.

reviews.review_heading: Overall I would like to say that this college has the best faculty but less infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. It’s not very good. We don’t have proper canteen facilities, and some buildings are broken or very old. Although there are renovations, they will take some time. Overall, the infrastructure is average.

reviews.review_heading: BAMMC offers media jobs with a great scope.
reviews.review_text: Well-developed and AC are available in every room. We have library, lab, computer rooms, etc. Many more foods in the canteen are also available. Everything is reasonable, perfect, and well-furnished. We enjoy spending time in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for management studies.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are very good and air-conditioned. There is also a good canteen facility. There is a gymkhana to play games and a library to study and be stress-free. They also take care of cleanliness across the whole campus, and there is an elevator facility for all students.

reviews.review_heading: My college has good infrastructure and decent placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: My college has good infrastructure with well-equipped classrooms and modern computer lab. There is a spacious library with a wide range of books. We have high-speed internet across the campus. There are also well-maintained sports facilities. We don't have any hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The development of Nagindas Khandwala College.
reviews.review_text: All classes have AC and work amazingly. We have a library which is accessible throughout the year. The canteen is great, and sports opportunities are also great. We have different sports and sports teams in our college. Wi-Fi is sadly not for students, but labs are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is an amazing experience to attend college at Nagindas Khandwala College.
reviews.review_text: The college is fully air-conditioned with a great and affordable canteen, excellent IT labs and library with all the facilities. The beautiful infrastructure surrounded by trees and plants makes it perfect. The college is well known for its large events and seminars held on campus which attract everyone.

reviews.review_heading: The Nagindas Khandwala BAF.
reviews.review_text: Nice teacher, good education. Classes and the interior of rooms could be improved. The classrooms are very shabby and not maintained. The labs are good, and the computers are nice. We don’t have Wi-Fi accessible to students. The canteen is okay, not too good, not too bad. We have game rooms too, which have chess and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and good placements in 2024 but not very great infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is a library and a computer lab in the college. The library has everything that a student needs to study and also a separate computer lab. The canteen is not up to the mark, and the gymkhana is also fine, which has games like chess, table tennis, and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: An awesome college to join with many fests.
reviews.review_text: All places like classrooms, a library, a sports place, a seminar hall, and conference rooms are very clean. They are enabled with high-speed internet. The quality of all these facilities is up to the mark. Our college has a canteen. It provides food at affordable rates. The quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and curriculum, vibrant campus life; needs more industry exposure and advanced tools.
reviews.review_text: The college provides well equipped computer labs with updated software reliable WiFi spacious classrooms and a comprehensive library for the B.Sc Computer Science course. Hostel facilities are comfortable with basic amenities although the food quality in the mess and canteen could improve. Medical facilities are available on campus for emergencies and there are ample space for sports and games, encouraging physical fitness and recreation for students.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Malad.
reviews.review_text:
There is Wi-Fi available on each floor of the building. 
The classrooms are big and spacious enough to accommodate 100 to 120 students. 
There are 4 computer labs. 
A variety of food is available in vegetarian and jain options. 
There is a gymkhana also made available to the students.

reviews.review_heading: Nagindas College:  The college of dreams, the college of success.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel yet in the college. If we talk about infrastructure, it’s super. With centrally air-conditioned rooms and Wi-Fi on all floors, with high speed, we have a well-organised lab with the latest  technology and versions. The excellent classroom has a projector and Ac

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nagindas Khandwala College.
reviews.review_text:
Classroom facilities are average. WiFi is only available in libraries. Computer labs are good. 
I will give a rating of 3 that is average, as the canteen provides a lot of varieties but the taste is average. Medical facilities are good first aid boxes, and other amenities are there. Sports are equally given importance, like football, cricket and many others. Also, indoor games like chess are promoted through various competitions.

college_info.intro:
Oriental University's popular programmes are MBA, BTech, and BSc. The university offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech programme offered at the university covers core courses in the areas of Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, CSE, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, and others. The MBA programme offered by the Oriental University is a two-year programme. It is offered in several specialisations, including Finance, HR, IT, Marketing, Data Analytics, and others. The below-mentioned are Oriental University's popular programmes:
For more information about Oriental University check out the below video:

faqs.answer: A:    The median package offered to the students pursuing BTech at Oriental University fluctuates every year. Based on the latest NIRF Report 2024 for Engineering at the university, the median pacakge offered across various BTech streams was INR 3.2 LPA in 2023. In 2022, the median package offered during BTech placements at the university was INR 3 LPA. The median package offered to BTech students in 2024 will be released with the release of NIRF report 2025.

For four-year BTech programme, the total fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 3.2 Lakh. The programme fee for BTech in CSE is higher than the other streams. faqs.question: What is the course fee for four years B.Tech at Oriental University?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to Oriental University is both entrance-based and merit-based. For undergraduate technical courses, admission is through the 12th percentage and national level test JEE. However, for other courses, admission is granted based on the 12th standard marks itself.So, while some courses may require an entrance exam, others may not. It’s recommended to check the specific admission criteria for the course you’re interested in on the official Oriental University website or admission portalThe basic eligibility for students seeking admission to the B.Tech course includes passing the 10+2 exam with Physics, Maths, and Chemistry/Biology/Biotechnology/Vocational Sciences as main subjects through a recognised board or university with a minimum of 45% marks.I hope this information helps! If you have any other questions, feel free to ask.
faqs.question: Can students join Oriental University directly without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    NTA has announced the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2. JEE Main 2026 Session 2 exam will be held from 2nd April 2026 to 9th April 2026. The JEE Main Application Form 2026 for Session 2 will be available on the website.
faqs.question: What is the JEE Main 2026 exam date for Session 2 ?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates who are interested in admission at Oriental University MBA course in any specialisation must have passed graduation in any discipline with a minimum 50% aggregate marks for General category and 45% aggregate marks for SC/ST/OBC. Admissions at Oriental University are based on national-level entrance examinations. Therefore, in addition to meeting the basic eligibility criteria, candidates have to appear for either CAT or MAT examination to be considered for the admission process.

overview_faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Pharma at Oriental University?

overview_faqs.answer: Oriental University BTech fee varies across the BTech streams and specialisations offered at the university. For four-year BTech programme, the total fee ranges between INR 1.1 Lacs and INR 3.2 Lakh. The programme fee for BTech in CSE is higher than the other streams. overview_faqs.question: Is B.Pharma available at Oriental University?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, BPharma is available at Oriental University. The university admits students to its BPharma programme through the regular and the lateral entry mode. The durations of the regular BPharma programme and the lateral entry programme are four and three years, respectively. The university's Faculty of Pharmacy provides the programme. The total fee for the regular BPharma programme is INR 3.4 lakh. Eligible candidates can register for BPharma at Oriental University through the university's official website.

review_summary.college_name: Oriental University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL. B. (Hons) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students got placed from my course. The highest package is 72 LPA, the lowest is 2.0 LPA, and the average is 25 LPA in my course. Shardul Amarchand Mangaldas and Co and Trilegal are the top recruiting companies. The percentage of students placed is 70 to 77 percent in the above-named companies and in Luthra and Luthra Law Offices, Indus Law, P&A Law Offices, etc. Roles offered are Advocates, advisory, legal firm, corporate lawyers, in-house counsel, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory here for everyone, and a gym facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.

content.Placements: The college placement drive is impressive, with an average package of 5 LPA. The highest package offered is 72 LPA. Top recruiters like TCS, Deloitte, Accenture, Wipro, and HCL provided diverse and rewarding opportunities, reflecting strong industry connections.
content.Infrastructure: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Business Intelligence and Analytics (BIA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.

content.Placements: The placement record is 80%. The highest package for BBA students is 8 LPA to 10 LPA. Asian Paints, HDFC Bank, and Axis Bank are recruiting companies. 80% of students got internships in this course in companies. The business analysis associated is offered.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Oriental University is the best.

content.Placements: Something 60% of students were placed in my course. The highest package was 8 LPA. The lowest package was 4.5 LPA. Recruiting companies were Ciplox, Incava, PCL, Mankind, etc. Something 70% of students got internships from my course. The role offered was mainly marketing and based on your internships.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in CSE (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.

content.Placements: Hello, I’m Asutosh Pastor. I enrolled in Oriental University Indore in September 2024 for B.Tech. In my class, there are 60 students. My fee is 70,000, and the actual fee is 75,000. Since I got 70% in Class 12, I received a discount. However, I asked for more discounts because I belong to the EWS category, but they did not provide any discounts for EWS. They only provide discounts for OBC and SC categories. The college and hostel are decent. .
content.Infrastructure: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

admission_overview.college_name: Oriental University Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_overview.title: Oriental University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Oriental University admission is offered on both academic merit and entrance test scores depending on the programme. The university provides courses at UG, PG, Diploma, and PhD levels. These courses are offered in the fields of Agriculture, Engineering, Science, Commerce, Computer Applications, and more. Interested students can register themselves on the Oriental University admission portal at admission.oui.edu.in. The mode of application available is both online and offline. Students who wish to apply offline, have to visit the Oriental University, Indore campus along with relevant documents. The complete admission process is based on the respective entrance examination. Interested students can go through the following sections to know about the eligibility, selection criteria, and admission process for Oriental Univeristy.

eligibility_selection.title: Oriental University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Oriental University course admissions are offered based on preset admission criteria. The university shorlists students based on respective national-level entrance examinations or academic merit in the qualifying exam. The accepted tests include JEE/ CUET/ CLAT/ CAT/ UCEED, and more. However, merit is also considered selective programmes, such as BA, BPharma, BSc, etc. The university offers its courses through various departments. These focus in the key area of specialisations, such as Engineering, Law, Pharmacy, and more. It is important that the applicants fulfil the eligibility and selection requirements to get admission. The admission requirements for popular Oriental University courses are as below:

faqs.question: Who is eligible for Oriental University admission?

paragraphs: The admission process for Oriental University is conducted online via the official website of the university. Students need to submit valid entrance scores or provide scores in the last qualifying exam to be eligible. The university conducts a common admission process for all of its courses. Find below the steps to complete theOriental University admission process:
Oriental University Indore Application Process 2026

Visit the official website of the university to apply for the desired programme by filling the application form. The Common Application Form may be collected physically from the admission office of the university. Students have to submit the form with documents & application fees.
Oriental University Selection Process 2026

Students are shortlisted based on their performance in the accepted entrance exam or score secured by them in the last qualifying exam. Students also have to appear for counselling rounds to get selected. The rounds are divided into different phases. It is also applicable to get the scholarships.
Oriental University Admission Confirmation 2026
Students can pay theOriental University admission feesand go through verification of documents for seat confirmation.

The Oriental University fee structure changes depending on the programme, specialisation, and category. Students have to pay the fees through accepted payment gateway before the last date. The total fees include different components. Some of these are tuition fees, exam fees, library fees, caution deposit, and more.

placement_report.college_name: Oriental University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Oriental University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The University has released a few placement statistics for the 2025 drive as the drive is still ongoing. As of now, 886 placements have been grabbed by the 2025 batch. Of all the participating companies, TCS offered the highest number of placements.

Earlier, over 1,157 placements were made to the 2024 passing-out batch and Cognizant emerged as the top recruiter with the highest number of placements offered (186). In addition to this, the University has a legacy of 100% placement assistance. The highest package offered during Oriental University placements 2024 was INR 72 LPA . Furthermore, the average package stood at INR 5.30 LPA . The list of recruiters who participated in recent drives included TCS, Alembic, Hyundai , and many others.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Oriental University?
faqs.answer: The University offers 100% placement assistance to its students. As per the official brochure, 886 placements were made during the academic year 2024-25. However, the placement sessioon is still ongoing. Earlier, the highest and average packages offered during the 2024 drive were INR 72 LPA and INR 5.30 LPA, respectively. highlights.description: Oriental University is one of the most popular institutes of the country. Most of the ranking bodies have recognised this institute as one of the popular choices among students. The institute has been ranked #68 by the India Today 2025 under the category University (Private). The institute has been ranked well by eminent ranking bodies because of its curriculum, infrastructure and well-qualified faculty. Students can check the article in this space for more details around the Oriental University rankings.

rankings.highlight: 5th Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Madhya Pradesh In 2023

reviews.review_heading: Raw, real, natural- A real with no concealed things is shared.
reviews.review_text: The facility the university provides is great, with Wi-Fi availability, computer labs, big airy classrooms with big windows for ventilation, and comfortable chairs and tables. Library with different books up to more than 35000 books. The hostel provides geysers, RO water, attached washrooms, Wi-Fi, electricity 24/7, etc. Food quality is good, but the taste is average. The canteen is good, and it has different tastes from state to state. They have a dedicated facility, also. Sports are compulsory...

reviews.review_heading: Great college with experienced faculty members, modern infrastructure, and vibrant campus events.
reviews.review_text: College has an amazing library from where you can take books during exam times, it also has a Wi-Fi facility. Hostel infrastructure is well-maintained, offering spacious rooms, reliable Wi-Fi, and essential amenities for comfortable stay. We have common areas, mess facilities, and cleanliness standards that contribute positively to student life on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is a good university and its placement record is also good.
reviews.review_text: Our college is fully smart and Wi-Fi is available. Labs are available and digital classrooms are available. We also have a library in this college. The best food quality is provided in our hostel. Best quality available in the mess. Wi-Fi is fully free in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Oriental University is the best.
reviews.review_text: All facilities were available in my department. Wi-Fi was also available. Classrooms were clean and different subjects had different labs. Watercooler and washrooms were also available. Good and best facilities were available in minimum amount in the hostel. Mess and canteen were also available.

reviews.review_heading: Voice of a Student of Oriental University Indore.
reviews.review_text: In the hostel, there are many types of seating. I chose a three-seater because it is the cheapest, and it costs me about ₹67,000 per year. In this, I get one almirah, one chair, and one study table. The biggest issue in the hostel is that there is no Wi-Fi at all. Wi-Fi is only available on the ground floor. If you want to download or do something on the internet, you have to go to the ground floor.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in this range. If you have no other choices, you can apply to this college.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure and facilities are good.  
Wi-Fi is available but on the first floor.  
Canteen is all okay.  
Library is all good. I like it.  
Classrooms are spacious.  
And just labs are also okay.  
Sports may happen sometimes or not.  
Medical facility is available.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers are supportive, and the environment of college is quite good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, a library, and classrooms are available. Food available in canteen is good, but the food in the mess is average. Environment is library is quite peaceful, we can study there without any disturbance and Wi-Fi is also available. Every floor has a lift and labs are available for practical .

reviews.review_heading: The college and the facilities or infrastructure are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure are good. Wi-Fi surveillance is available, and the smart classroom and the central library are located, and many other classes. The quality of food is average in the mess. There are four-time meals in the mess. A canteen is also located.

reviews.review_heading: College life in Oriental University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our department is really vast, with labs for practical knowledge. The university also provides hostel facilities for students from different cities. The hostel provides mess facilities as well as Wi-Fi. Regional festivals of students from different states are also celebrated in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Why Oriental University Indore is good for you!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good; allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Why choose Oriental University, Indore?
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, spacious, and overall a good environment. Classrooms are good, and the library is good. Every book related to the course is available. Only the library has that there is no Wi-Fi all over campus. Food in the canteen is excellent. Sports facilities are less regular, not sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Oriental University .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university is good and management of the university is good canteens are well arranged and good food is provided. Furthermore, hostels are well-designed and maintained, and the meals are tasty. Many courses are available at our university with nice arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: The dream university: Oriental.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our university is good, allowing students to enjoy the facilities provided. The classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained, and the library has many books for students to read. The hostels are of good quality, and the food is outstanding.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely great college value for money good at .
reviews.review_text: Excellent library, big classrooms with projector, advanced labs with wi-fi facilities are available. Well qualified faculty members are also there. Teaching method of faculty members is also very good. Hostel provides all necessary facilities like wi-fi,  24*7 water combined bathrooms with rooms, indoor badminton court, cctv, nice balcony with room of three types-  single, double and triple seater. Mess is also very good, it provides healthy and hygienic food at proper time. Mess is very clean. ...

reviews.review_heading: My college provides all activities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are available in our college, like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries, which are well organized, and their labs are digital. In the hostel, all facilities are good, like mess food, which is hygienic, and medical facilities are good, and sports and games are good.

paragraphs: Yes, BTech aspirants at Oriental University can avail a fee rebate under OU-Aspire scholarship provided by the university. The merit-based scholarships at Oriental University are awared to the BTech students based on their merit in JEE Main or HSC. Based on the information available on the university's official website, an applicant with a JEE (Main) rank under 5 Lacs is eligible for a fee rebate under Criteria 1 of OU-Aspire scholarship. If the candidate is pursuing BTech in a stream other than CSE, their annual fee will be reduced from INR 40,000 to INR 32,500. For students pursuing BTech in CSE, the fee amount will be reduced from INR 75,000 to INR 60,000. The mentioned information is subject to change and hence, is indicative.

reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied because of their teaching method.

review_content.Placements: Top recruiting companies for our courses are Zydus, Apollo, and many more known companies. Top roles offered in our courses were a medical representative, pharmacist, medical business, medicine developer, medical researchers and many more like this.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has a good kind of environment in their library. The library was completely silent, as I like it. It has a hostel facility too and their canteen's food quality was amazing, just like homemade food and it tasted so good. It's classroom was so neat and clean.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: The honest review of Monark University from a passed-out student.

review_content.Placements: In my course, there are minimal students who get placement from colleges, and they also don't provide any internships from their side; we have to search for companies for an internship. Many of us did paid internships instead of internships with Stifund.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are the worst. They just say, "We have 2 thousand labs," but in reality, the lab was trash. Many PCs are in trashy condition. There is no Wi-Fi available, and there are network issues, even if you have your own internet. The library was nice, we can say.

answer.text: Generally speaking, Monark University is regarded as a Tier 2. Many undergraduate and graduate degrees are available, and it has accreditation from reputable organizations like the AICTE and NAAC. It is not, however, typically placed among India's top-tier (Tier 1) universities, which include establishments like IITs and IIMs that are well-known both domestically and internationally. Monark places more of an emphasis on cheap education and regional influence.

overview_faqs.question: Is Monark University a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Monark University is a decent higher education institution situated in Ahmedabad with a good infrastructure, campus, and helpful faculty. Reviews often praised modern facilities and a lively campus atmosphere. The university has also many courses with a plain application process. Monark University reviews however quite different when it comes to the placement rates and the concerns about other universities, like management of resources and transport connections.

overview_faqs.question: What is the application fee for the B.Tech. program at Monark University?
overview_faqs.answer: The application fee for the B.Tech. at Monark University would be around ?1,000; this fee is charged while applying for undergraduate courses, but for the specific details about the admission, including deadlines and fee structures, visiting their official website or contacting the admissions office is advisable.

review_summary.college_name: Monark University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: BBA Hons. - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Monark University is really good, and its canteen provides the best food.

content.Placements: There is a 95% pass rate from the course. The college includes top recruiters like Tata, Toyota, Axis Bank, etc. The top roles offered in my course are HR, management, finance, data analytics, marketing, and digital marketing. It also focuses on English communication.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average but flexible. The department is very supportive; all the faculty and staff are very good. The quality of the hostel is average, but the food they provide is really like home. There have been no issues regarding health or safety concerns.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Human Resource Management - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Go for it guys. Really the best.

content.Placements: Placements are good. Students getting placed were 70%. The highest package was 10 LPA+, the lowest was 3 LPA. There are various top recruiters. 35% of students got internships. Managerial roles were the mostly provided roles by the college, course, and recruiters.
content.Infrastructure: The college is best in looks, gives you full Bollywood vibes, and the college is surrounded by greenery. Everything is just perfect. The college even had its own ambulance services, and many more things were there in the college and on its campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of their teaching method.

content.Placements: Top recruiting companies for our courses are Zydus, Apollo, and many more known companies. Top roles offered in our courses were a medical representative, pharmacist, medical business, medicine developer, medical researchers and many more like this.
content.Infrastructure: It has a good kind of environment in their library. The library was completely silent, as I like it. It has a hostel facility too and their canteen's food quality was amazing, just like homemade food and it tasted so good. It's classroom was so neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The honest review of Monark University from a passed-out student.

content.Placements: In my course, there are minimal students who get placement from colleges, and they also don't provide any internships from their side; we have to search for companies for an internship. Many of us did paid internships instead of internships with Stifund.
content.Infrastructure: The labs are the worst. They just say, "We have 2 thousand labs," but in reality, the lab was trash. Many PCs are in trashy condition. There is no Wi-Fi available, and there are network issues, even if you have your own internet. The library was nice, we can say.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our course infrastructure is worth the money.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities provided at our university are 100%. Internships are provided by the university.
content.Infrastructure: Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. Classrooms are big and 25 to 30 personal computers are available in every lab. Library consists of books for every course. Canteen serves good food. Our campus is big. There is a separate building for every course.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are well-graduated. Teaching quality is great. They arrange extra classes for students who joined late. Exams are easy if students study. The pass percentage is based on exams. Experts are invited from the industry to make students industry ready.

admission_overview.college_name: Monark University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Monark University admission 2025is both merit and entrance-based. The institution accepts entrance exams to shortlist candidates for various courses. Some of the exams accepted by the institution includesNEET, NEET PG, and ACPC Admission, etc.Monark Universityoffers around106courses on its campus. These are available at UG, PG, After 10th, Certificate and Doctorate levels.
NOTE: Please note that this fee information is obtained from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.
lists: Monark University Duration: The institution offers UG programmes for54 months - 5 yearsduration. For PG level courses, the duration is1 year - 2 years.

Monark University Fees: The total tuition fee for programmes offered at UG level isINR 72,000 - 2,55,000. For PG level courses, the total tuition fee isINR 30,000 - 1,92,000. Candidates can pay the fee in the mode specified by the institution.

faqs.question: Is CUET cumpulsory for MBA admission at Monark University?
faqs.answer: CUET Common University Entrance Test is not needed for MBA at Monark University. Entrance tests scores, including CAT, MAT, or GMAT, can also be considered for MBA courses. Even direct admissions in management quota or merit quota are possible. It would be advisable to log on to the website of the university or directly approach the Admission Office for exact details on entrance tests and other qualifying criteria.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Monark University?
faqs.answer: The answer is that the direct admissions at Monark University are offered for certain programs like B.Tech., directly through merit or in the management quota. For such criteria, the candidate must have a good academic record and a good score in relevant entrance exams. For such criteria and procedures for direct admission, reach the Admission office of the University or look for it at their official website.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Monark University for admission MBA?
faqs.answer: Candidates must havepassed 10+2 or equivalent from a recognized board in India. Monark University accepts results from the CAT, MAT, and JEMAT entrance exams for MBA admissions. Candidates' results on the university's entrance exam may also be used to determine their eligibility.

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission in Monark University?
faqs.answer: Yes, is it easy to get admission in Monark University. The university accepts admission based on merit. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course. Monark University course admission begins with the online application. Interested candidates can apply directly through the official website.

placement_report.college_name: Monark University Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: Monark University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Monark University has released the highest package offered during the recent placement drive. According to the latest report, the highest package offered during the recent Monark University placements stood at INR 30 LPA, and the highest stipend offered was INR 40,000 per month. Some of the top recruiters of Monark University include Adani Group, Airtel, TCS, IBM, Voltas, Wipro, etc.

faqs.question: What are the job opportunities after doing MBA from Monark University?
faqs.answer: Once an MBA is obtained from Monark University, then, after this two-year graduation program, graduates can check into the host of various roles across finance, marketing, human resource, operations, and consulting sectors. Some common roles include a Marketing Manager, Financial Analyst, Human Resources Manager, Operations Manager, or a Business Consultant. Apart from this, some may even begin their own business or work as leaders in startups. An employment placement cell is there in the university to connect students with recruiters and also build as many opportunities as possible with private as well as government sectors. Employment opportunity increased through networking and internship.

reviews.review_heading: Monark University is really good, and its canteen provides the best food.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average but flexible. The department is very supportive; all the faculty and staff are very good. The quality of the hostel is average, but the food they provide is really like home. There have been no issues regarding health or safety concerns.

reviews.review_heading: Go for it guys. Really the best.
reviews.review_text: The college is best in looks, gives you full Bollywood vibes, and the college is surrounded by greenery. Everything is just perfect. The college even had its own ambulance services, and many more things were there in the college and on its campus.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of their teaching method.
reviews.review_text: It has a good kind of environment in their library. The library was completely silent, as I like it. It has a hostel facility too and their canteen's food quality was amazing, just like homemade food and it tasted so good. It's classroom was so neat and clean.

reviews.review_heading: The honest review of Monark University from a passed-out student.
reviews.review_text: The labs are the worst. They just say, "We have 2 thousand labs," but in reality, the lab was trash. Many PCs are in trashy condition. There is no Wi-Fi available, and there are network issues, even if you have your own internet. The library was nice, we can say.

reviews.review_heading: Our course infrastructure is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Labs, classrooms, and a library are available. Classrooms are big and 25 to 30 personal computers are available in every lab. Library consists of books for every course. Canteen serves good food. Our campus is big. There is a separate building for every course.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Monark University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average with very limited amenities. Wi-Fi is not available on campus. Food served in the canteen is costly and the taste is average.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus, supportive faculty, & great opportunities. The university provided scholarships.
reviews.review_text: Very nice college. The open garden and environment were very good. I pursued a B.E. in Mechanical Engineering at Monark University, and the experience was great. The campus was modern with well-equipped labs and a central library. On-campus hostel facilities were clean and comfortable.

reviews.review_heading: It is not a good college to study BCA.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi was not provided sometimes in our classrooms. Lights were not properly provided. The lab was not good and updated as they used the old version of computers. Classrooms were not good but the library was good. Hostel rooms were old and the canteen was not available. The quality of street food was low but the price was high. Sports were good.

data.description: Monark University has a sprawling campus equipped with state-of-the-art facilities with all the amenities offered at the campus. Monark University claims to have well-equipped laboratories catering to various disciplines like science, technology, commerce, and languages. The university has well-equipped classrooms, library, auditorium, conference hall, sports complex, and others. There's a dedicated transport facility with buses covering major routes in Ahmedabad.

Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria to proceed with the admission process. The University offers courses such as BTech, MBA and BSc as the popular course in full-time mode. To seek admission at any of the courses, candidates must qualify through merit and secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as GUJCET, JEE Main, CMAT or any other equivalent exam. The tuition fee of these courses ranges between INR 1.4 Lakh to INR 3.2 Lakh. review_summary.college_name: Sigma University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Information Technology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: My honest review about my college.

content.Placements: Placements and job opportunities are very good in the engineering line. And in our college placements and job opportunities are very good. So many companies are coming to our college for placements like Larson and Tubro, Rhine Engineering Pvt Ltd. They also get a stipend of Rs. 15,000. Also, good training in various branches of our technical field. It is overall average.
content.Infrastructure: Information Technology and Mathematical Innovation is a professional program that has a duration of 4 years and has 8 semesters in total. The course includes experiments, hands-on projects, innovative projects, model implementation, and much more. The days are full of learning and exams are a little tiring. I stay near to my college, I didn't go to PG hostels, but the review was good. Also, recommend others for the same. The fee is also affordable for any type of PG student from another city or any other country.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sigma University.

content.Placements: Above 70% of students got placements last year from my course. The highest package offered was 6.5 LPA. The lowest was 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies were Amazon, Uno Mind, L&T, UPL, Inox, and Godrej. Recently 60% of students got internships in our city in Vary company.
content.Infrastructure: There are three buildings. One for degree students, one for diploma, and one for pharmacy. All buildings are good. Good creativity on the walls has been shown. Wi-Fi is there. Labs are there for each subject. The Outdoor is too good. In the front, we have a main auditorium, where we play cricket most of the time. Behind the campus, there is one big football ground. So many facilities are there.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Chemical Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied of management and classroom and washrooms.

content.Infrastructure: The college does not have Wi-Fi facilities, except for one network that provides only 30 MB, which is not enough. Labs are average, and some are still under maintenance. Classrooms are okay or below average because some do not have properly working fans and are hot. The library is very good and silent, and it provides every book used in engineering. I don't have any experience with the hostel, but my friend lives there and says it is not a good place to stay, is very dirty, and lacks cleanliness. The food provided in the canteen is below average. The medical facilities available are basic, like tables and spray. Sports and games are not held at the hostel.

paragraphs: Sigma University admissionsis based on merit/entrance exam/counselling/in-house entrance exam as per respective courses. Candidates can apply online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Sigma University is as per the steps below:
1: Sigma University Application Process

The mode of application is online. Aspirants need to apply at the official website for all courses, i.e., https://admissions23.sigmauniversity.ac.in/. The application fee for PhD course is INR 1,500. The payment should be made online by credit card/debit card/net banking. Candidates can fill out the application form on the university's official website.
2: Selection

The university admits students based on GUJCET followed by ACPC Counselling, Merit, Entrance Exam + Viva as per respective courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of theSigma University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff get a seat. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Selected aspirants need to come for document verification. Aspirants need to pay theSigma University feeto confirm their seats in the university.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review about my college.
reviews.review_text: Information Technology and Mathematical Innovation is a professional program that has a duration of 4 years and has 8 semesters in total. The course includes experiments, hands-on projects, innovative projects, model implementation, and much more. The days are full of learning and exams are a little tiring. I stay near to my college, I didn't go to PG hostels, but the review was good. Also, recommend others for the same. The fee is also affordable for any type of PG student from another city or ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: There are three buildings. One for degree students, one for diploma, and one for pharmacy. All buildings are good. Good creativity on the walls has been shown. Wi-Fi is there. Labs are there for each subject. The Outdoor is too good. In the front, we have a main auditorium, where we play cricket most of the time. Behind the campus, there is one big football ground. So many facilities are there.

reviews.review_heading: If you want the college days you dream then no need to come.
reviews.review_text: The college lacks Wi-Fi, and there is no air conditioning. It doesn’t have a canteen like some other colleges. The canteen is rented out. Labs are acceptable, but you won’t have many opportunities to use them, as access is mostly limited to exams. Classroom facilities are okay, but there could be improvements.

reviews.review_heading: Review on sigma university .
reviews.review_text: Our social work department has modern classrooms seminar rooms and an auditorium. We have access to a library. The department has a computer lab which provides opportunities for research and paperwork. The hostel facilities are satisfactory. Our hostel has clean rooms bathrooms a common room and sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied of management and classroom and washrooms.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have Wi-Fi facilities, except for one network that provides only 30 MB, which is not enough. Labs are average, and some are still under maintenance. Classrooms are okay or below average because some do not have properly working fans and are hot. The library is very good and silent, and it provides every book used in engineering. I don't have any experience with the hostel, but my friend lives there and says it is not a good place to stay, is very dirty, and lacks cleanliness...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's good if you have to study and extra curriculum activities.
reviews.review_text: Me and my friends are not in the hostel, so we don’t know much about it, but it’s far away from college, like 2-3 km, and I don’t think they provide a mess or canteen in the hostel. Their hostel is like a guest house, not too many facilities, and the same goes for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: B.Tech in IT from the Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: Our college had a decent infrastructure for the IT course. All the necessary facilities, such as labs, libraries, canteens, Wi-Fi, sports, etc., were available for the students. The campus of the college was big and had ample parking space. Students were also getting hostel facilities at the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college and best experience.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the labs and classrooms is top-notch, allowing us to focus on our studies. Free Wi-Fi is also available. Hostel facilities are also available in the college. Separate hostels for boys and girls are provided. The food quality is also amazing.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sigma University.
reviews.review_text: The management department's infrastructure is exceptional. In fact, all the departments have good infrastructure. The classrooms are CCTV equipped. There are different libraries in the respective departments. A swimming pool and gym are available for fitness freaks.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, a smart library, and an advanced computer lab were available in our college. Our department was good. Our college had a good atmosphere, a sports area, and a cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for learning skills.
reviews.review_text: The campus is furnished with amenities including a canteen, library, lodging, labs, etc. The only place with Wi-Fi is the seminar room. Although the hostel has room for 170 students, rooms are assigned based on merit and a personal interview. It has a supervised fitness center for employees and students. Treadmills, workout benches, and other tools for lifting weights are included. The canteen at the college is spacious. 200 students can be accommodated at once. It attempts to offer wholesome me...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: There is a huge lab in our college. It has many classrooms and many auditoriums. It provides a hostel facility for both girls and boys. There are many canteens on our campus. The food served in the hostel is best. There is high security in our college.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college because of its good placements.
reviews.review_text: College and hostel both place are Wi-Fi is enabled, but short-range. The food served is medium test and quality to provide. Hostel is good, and I have enjoyed it. Security is available in both place and active all camera and security, which is completely secure and safe.

reviews.review_heading: This is a great place to recieve knowledge. It provides supportive faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It has different buildings for students of different streams. It has all the necessary amenities like well-equipped laboratories and classrooms. There is audiovisual aid in the classroom which helps in better learning. The library is filled with a variety of books required.

reviews.review_heading: Really good faculty members and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the campus includes all the amenities like labs, audio visual rooms and common rooms like auditorium. There are also a large variety of equipment to study and gain practical knowledge. Also many services like audio visual room for Learning.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Sigma University

likes.text: Top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys, Wipro, Rishabh Software, etc.

There are different hostels for girls (Bakrol Campus) and boys (Ajwa Road, Kamlanagar), Both hostels are well-equipped to provide a comfortable stay and a friendly atmosphere for studies.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. B.Ed. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The campus has beautiful surroundings, perfect for learning.

review_content.Placements: In my course, around 60 students are enrolled in the B.Sc. B.Ed. program. We are not offered salary packages. Our internship, which lasts for two months. It is conducted by the department itself. However, we do not get paid during it. All students get internships, but there is no job guarantee.
review_content.Infrastructure: We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. They are not very updated as per current demands. Hostel facilities are below average, with poor hygiene in food and water facilities. No canteen is present on the hostel campus, and the hostel building is weak.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Study with nature in a calm place like Dr. Harisingh Gour University.

review_content.Placements: 80 to 90 percent of students get placed in the judiciary, corporate, and Litigation. The university is very well known for its law course because of its placement and environment. The highest package it got is 39 LPA in the corporate sector for one of our alumni. Thus, it is a very well known university for its placement in the judiciary. We have our alumni in various high courts of India, as well as in the Supreme Court of India.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have different classrooms for each B.A. LL.B. LL.B. L.M. course. There is also a separate library in our department only for law students, where you can find any books of your subject from 1st sem to 10th sem, plus there are also journals. There is also a moot court hall in our department.

review_summary.college_name: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is value for money and easy-going.

content.Placements: Officially, there are 0 percent placements from the college side. Few students do get placed through their own ability and off-campus efforts, and that percentage is also very low. Hence, we have to be self-dependent here in this region, although management might make certain efforts.
content.Infrastructure: Talking about infrastructure, the university offers MHRD Wi-Fi (which often creates some hurdles), but it is a decent one to go with. There is a separate computer lab as well. We have a law library there with comfortable seats, a peaceful environment, and books on almost every relevant subject.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: No placements but qualified teachers and good hands-on practice to get placed.

content.Placements: If I talk about placements, there are no placements as such in this field. You have to be perfect in terms of lab work and equipment to get project work in labs, like ICMR, DRDO, etc. Most students pursue Ph.D. after M.Sc. If I talk about roles, you will be a biotechnologist and can discover drugs, vaccines, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Recently, in 2025, the Biotechnology department is assigned a new building with the best laboratory facilities, Wi-Fi, smart class, and a personal library for the department. If I talk about the hostel, it is quite old, but almost all sorts of facilities are available, like geysers, medical doctors, etc. There is a basketball court and volleyball court also, and students play cricket quite often on weekends.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. B.Ed. (Botany, Zoology, Chemistry) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The campus has beautiful surroundings, perfect for learning.

content.Placements: In my course, around 60 students are enrolled in the B.Sc. B.Ed. program. We are not offered salary packages. Our internship, which lasts for two months. It is conducted by the department itself. However, we do not get paid during it. All students get internships, but there is no job guarantee.
content.Infrastructure: We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. They are not very updated as per current demands. Hostel facilities are below average, with poor hygiene in food and water facilities. No canteen is present on the hostel campus, and the hostel building is weak.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Study with nature in a calm place like Dr. Harisingh Gour University.

content.Placements: 80 to 90 percent of students get placed in the judiciary, corporate, and Litigation. The university is very well known for its law course because of its placement and environment. The highest package it got is 39 LPA in the corporate sector for one of our alumni. Thus, it is a very well known university for its placement in the judiciary. We have our alumni in various high courts of India, as well as in the Supreme Court of India.
content.Infrastructure: We have different classrooms for each B.A. LL.B. LL.B. L.M. course. There is also a separate library in our department only for law students, where you can find any books of your subject from 1st sem to 10th sem, plus there are also journals. There is also a moot court hall in our department.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, good faculty members with good teaching experience.

content.Placements: Placement rate is not so high, but still better than that of other colleges. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 2.5 LPA, and the average is around 4 LPA. Good internship rate, tie up with major companies like Google Cloud and Amazon for the internship programme.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, proper labs are there, and proper classes. Food is average, but the overall facilities are good.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very good, they're highly qualified, have great knowledge, and are always ready to help. The course curriculum is relevant, proper knowledge of subjects is provided, and the teaching is good enough to make students ready for the industry. Exams are not so difficult, it's easy if you attend regular classes and just revise your lessons properly. The passing rate is very high. Teachers give the best Knowledge.

admission_overview.college_name: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Selection Process & Dates

admission_process.title: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Admission process 2025

paragraphs: Dr Harisingh Gour University formerly known as Sagar University offers degree, diploma, and certificate programs to aspirants at the undergraduate (UG), postgraduate (PG), and doctorate (PhD) level. Programmes offered at Dr Harisingh Gour University are in streams including Science, Arts (Fine/ Visual/Performing), Accounting & Commerce, Business & Management Studies, Engineering, Humanities & Social Sciences, and Law.

Candidates have to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria for Dr Harisingh Gour University admissions to various UG & PG courses, followed by the other selection rounds. Find below the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to Dr Harisingh Gour University course admissions 2025:

Dr Harisingh Gour University fees may include various components such as Tuition Fees, Admission Fees, etc. Candidates have to pay a certain amount of fees at the time of admission. The below table mentions the Dr Harisingh Gour University fees for various UG & PG courses:
Dr Harisingh Gour University offers PG courses via its campus and various affiliated colleges. Find below the seat bifurcation for various courses offered at Dr Harishsingh Gour University:

Dr Harisingh Gour University admissions 2025 are both merit and entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process. Find below the detailed process around Harishsingh Gour University admissions 2025:
Step 1: Dr Harisingh Gour University Application Process 2025

Dr Harisingh Gour University's admission process for 2025 starts with the application process. Candidates can download the application process from the university's official website. The duly filled application form has to be sent either through post or submitted in person at the concerned department at Dr Harisingh Gour University. However, the application and entrance test fee will be paid online and candidates have to attach the pay slip along with the two copies of the online bank challan with the application form.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Admission to all the PG courses at Dr Harisingh Gour University is entrance-based. Candidates have to qualify for either university-level or state-level entrance exams such as CUET for the selection of respective courses. Admissions to UG courses are based on merit scores obtained in the last qualifying exam.
Step 3: Merit List Release & Counselling

After the completion of all the selection rounds, candidates have to appear for the counselling process for the respective courses. Later on, the university will release the merit list in various rounds of the selected candidates. Students who find their names on the merit list need to pay a certain amount of fee to secure their seats.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

placement_report.college_name: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Placement & Salary Insights

placement_data.title: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: As per the NIRF report 2024 released by Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya, the median package offered during UG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.53 LPA . Further, the median package offered during PG 2-year and PG 3-year placements 2023 stood at INR 5.11 LPA and INR 9.42 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, nine BSc Forensic students and six MBA students have been placed during Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya placements 2023 . The placement season is still on and the complete statistics are not available on the official website. Till now, a total of 192 students have registered and 121 students participated during the placement drive 2023.

faqs.question: How many companies participated in Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya placements 2023?
faqs.answer: Numerous companies have taken part in Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya placements. Across multiple disciplines, more than 150 companies took part in campus placement drives at Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya. Wipro, Cognizant, Infosys, Tata Consultancy Services, and others were major recruiters. The average salary package was between 4.5 and 5 LPA, while the highest salary package offered in placements was 16 LPA. Employers such as Microsoft, Samsung R&D, Amazon, and others have held recruitment drives here in recent years. Software development, core engineering, IT/software services, financial services, analytics, and more are important fields where students have been placed. After the placement season ends, the placement numbers are typically updated.

faqs.question: Are there any government job opportunities that I can seek after completing B.Pharm from Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya?
faqs.answer: After completing a BPharm degree from Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya, graduates can pursue various government job related to Pharmaceutical field. Some of these include: Drug Inspector : You can appear for state or central government exams to become a Drug Inspector. Pharmacist : Positions in government hospitals, clinics, and healthcare centers. Lecturer : Teaching positions in government colleges after clearing NET or similar exams. Research Officer : Jobs in government research institutions like CSIR or ICMR.

highlights.description: Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya is one of India’s top institutes. It is ranked #17 by the Outlook 2025 under the Central Universities category. It ranked #274 in the QS World Rankings 2026, internationally. institute is well-known for its well-structured academic curriculum, excellent faculty, and well-laid infrastructure. The Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya rankings have been explained in the article below:

outlook.description:
As per the overall score, Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya has been placed at a good position by the Outlook under the 'Central Universities' category, reflecting its exceptional performance in areas like Teaching, Research, Graduation Outcomes, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. It is observable that in the 'Central Universities' category, the institute's ranks have shown stability in trend when evaluated against the ranking of the past year. In 2025, Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya's rank is #17, the same as last year's rank in the 'Central Universities' category by the Outlook ranking.

qs_world.description:
Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya has been ranked well by the QS World University Rankings under the 'Asia' category. Through the years, the QS World University Rankings for Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya indicate the institute's strong performance in important areas such as the Quality of Education, Conducting Impactful Research, the Expertise of Faculty members, and Overall Institutional Management. These good rankings not only prove the institute's good reputation but also highlight its excellence across diverse domains, evaluated against the standards established by the QS World University Rankings. It has been seen that in the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have shown a decreasing trend when evaluated against the ranking of the prior year. In 2026, Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya fell 150 ranks to #851 rank in the 'Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
It has been seen that within the category of 'Southern Asia', the institute's ranking has fallen when compared with the previous year's ranking. In 2026, Dr Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya fell 52 ranks to #274 rank in the 'Southern Asia' category by the QS World University Rankings. This is the second consecutive year that the institute has slipped in the rankings.
