reviews.review_text: Talking about infrastructure, the university offers MHRD Wi-Fi (which often creates some hurdles), but it is a decent one to go with. There is a separate computer lab as well. We have a law library there with comfortable seats, a peaceful environment, and books on almost every relevant subject.

reviews.review_heading: No placements but qualified teachers and good hands-on practice to get placed.
reviews.review_text: Recently, in 2025, the Biotechnology department is assigned a new building with the best laboratory facilities, Wi-Fi, smart class, and a personal library for the department. If I talk about the hostel, it is quite old, but almost all sorts of facilities are available, like geysers, medical doctors, etc. There is a basketball court and volleyball court also, and students play cricket quite often on weekends.

reviews.review_heading: The campus has beautiful surroundings, perfect for learning.
reviews.review_text: We are provided with Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library. They are not very updated as per current demands. Hostel facilities are below average, with poor hygiene in food and water facilities. No canteen is present on the hostel campus, and the hostel building is weak.

reviews.review_heading: Study with nature in a calm place like Dr. Harisingh Gour University.
reviews.review_text: We have different classrooms for each B.A. LL.B. LL.B. L.M. course. There is also a separate library in our department only for law students, where you can find any books of your subject from 1st sem to 10th sem, plus there are also journals. There is also a moot court hall in our department.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by Babulal Tarabai Institute of Research and Technology (BTIRT)
reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, good faculty members with good teaching experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, proper labs are there, and proper classes. Food is average, but the overall facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members are good. Value for money in law.
reviews.review_text: The building for the department is very old, so parts of it are getting broken. The building is not good as it is totally based on old structures. Our Moot Court Hall and Law Library building are good, but there is no water cooler in the Law Library and Moot Court Hall. We have a Wi-Fi connection in the department as well as in the library. We have 6 to 7 classrooms and one computer lab, but it’s not in operation. We have a good hostel, but there is water scarcity, and the cleanliness in the was...

reviews.review_heading: Average, but go for it. It will be worth it.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided in the college labs, library, clean washrooms, everything. If we talk about the hostel, every necessary thing is provided, from hygiene and food to silence. Only girls stay in a single hostel, which is safe, and everything is good.

reviews.review_heading: Best college with low budget fees.
reviews.review_text: Personal library in my department. There is a sports stadium at some distance from my college for the development of the physical skills of the students. There is no mess in hostel, you have to order lunch service outside the hostel. There is a small medical hospital of the college, which is only for college students.

reviews.review_heading: Pocket friendly is the easiest way to pursue anything.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms have air conditioning and comfortable furniture for sitting. There are water coolers over there, and we have lifts in our building that are open for students. Classrooms of BBA are worse in comparison to MBA classes. Talking about hostels, they have been renovated recently and offer enough facilities to the students. There is a university stadium that offers different types of sporting opportunities for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Budget friendly college with good studies.
reviews.review_text: In my course, there is very good facility. We have a personal library in my department. There is no mess facility in hostel. You can hire a lunch service in the hostel. There is medical hospital of college which is for only college students. There are sports activities organised in my college for the development of the students.

reviews.review_heading: If you want a good environment with a good city and knowledge, then you should come here.
reviews.review_text: In the case of infrastructure, it is well developed, and Wi-Fi is available on the campus. Labs are good, and the library is famous in India. It is one of the biggest libraries in India. There is a hospital for students for minor health problems, which is also near the sports area. There is a whole stadium for students, and different sports are available.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus, good study. They give you a good life.
reviews.review_text: The facilities here are good, and a personal library is situated in my college. Also, I can pursue lunch service in the hostel. There is a medical hospital of the college, which is only for college students. They are organizing sports activities for the development of the students.

reviews.review_heading: A good college in your budget.
reviews.review_text: In my course, there is a very good faculty and a personal library situated in my department. Also, labs and big classrooms with projectors are very helpful for studying. There is no mess facility in the hostel; you can pursue lunch service in the hostel. There is a medical hospital of the college, which is for only college students. There are sports games organized in which, if you are selected, you can go from the regional to the national level of the game.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available are very poor for students in the geology department, which is a very old building, but it's the best department in the university. That's why the maximum number of students take geology. The hostel is good but not the best in food and security.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good quality of education.
reviews.review_text: As a Central University, the fees are significantly lower than private institutions, making education accessible to a wider range of students. The sprawling 1312.89-acre campus boasts good infrastructure, including a Central Library (one of the largest in Madhya Pradesh), departmental libraries, computer labs, and smart labs. The hostel facility is also good, with an affordable mess service.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Dr. Harisingh Gour Vishwavidyalaya

likes.text: Many internship programs were held for students, and many top companies came for recruitment.
The placement cell provides opportunities to all students with good academic performance to get placed.

The infrastructure of this college is very good; it includes facilities like a library, hostel, mess, Wi-Fi, etc.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Arya Post Graduate College provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software, and have a fee structure of around INR 17,650 to 28,215. UG programs include B.Sc., BCA and B.Com. Further, the PG programs include M.Sc., M.Com and M.A.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Non Medical - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college was average.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 40-50% students get placement. 1 LPA to 1.75 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, ICICI, Walmart, Adobe, HCL, Yamaha, TCS, IBM, DAKSH, Mahindra & Mahindra, APEX Labs. 20-30% of students got internships. They didn't tell me. And my batch students were good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were average. The whole class had A.C., and the air was good. And Wi-Fi is also good with clean classrooms. And yes, my college has a canteen, and the food quality was also good; me and my friends used to eat from the college canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Arya PG College is the top college in Panipat.

review_content.Placements: The highest package in my course is 50-75L per month, the lowest package is 25-75 thousand per month, and the average package is 25-40 thousand per month. The top recruiting companies in my course are Google, HDFC, Kotak, Airtel, Tata, Microsoft, Tesla, etc. Top roles in my course are Data admin, Web developer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: High-speed Wi-Fi in every classroom, fresh drinking water, neat and clean washrooms, working computers in the computer lab, and a library with a large collection of books available. Internet zone for students, a separate library sitting area for boys and girls, well-maintained infrastructure, and time-to-time renovation. Neat and clean food in the canteen.

review_summary.college_name: Arya Post Graduate College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My honest review on Arya PG College Panipat.

content.Placements: The highest package in my course M. Com is 15-25 LPA and the lowest is 1-2 LPA. Top recruiting companies in my course are Airtel, HDFC, SBI, ICICI, Google, Microsoft, TCS, Vivo, etc. In my knowledge, almost 39-64 percent students got internship or jobs just after completing their course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in this college are top. I am very satisfied with this college. Facilities are neat and clean – drinking water, neat and clean classrooms, neat and clean washrooms, separate entry and exit gate for boys and girls, separate park for boys & girls, and food quality in canteen is fine.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Commerce (M.Com.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Arya PG College is really good college because of their good facility and good placements.

content.Placements: In my course M.Com, almost 30-35 percent of students are placed. The highest package is around 5-9 LPA, and the lowest package is 2-5 LPA, with an average package of around 1-4 LPA. Companies include Kotak, Canara Bank, Union Bank of India, etc. Around 50-65 percent of students got internships just after completing their course. Top roles offered are banker, tax consultant, CA accountant, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college has well-maintained classrooms, 24/7 CCTV cameras, a large collection of books in the library, fresh drinking water, separate parks for boys and girls, and very good canteen with fresh food. Free Wi-Fi is available for all students, and working computers are available in the internet zone attached to the library.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Non Medical - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college was average.

content.Placements: Mostly 40-50% students get placement. 1 LPA to 1.75 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Wipro, ICICI, Walmart, Adobe, HCL, Yamaha, TCS, IBM, DAKSH, Mahindra & Mahindra, APEX Labs. 20-30% of students got internships. They didn't tell me. And my batch students were good.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure were average. The whole class had A.C., and the air was good. And Wi-Fi is also good with clean classrooms. And yes, my college has a canteen, and the food quality was also good; me and my friends used to eat from the college canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Arya PG College is the top college in Panipat.

content.Placements: The highest package in my course is 50-75L per month, the lowest package is 25-75 thousand per month, and the average package is 25-40 thousand per month. reviews.review_heading: My honest review on Arya PG College Panipat.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in this college are top. I am very satisfied with this college. Facilities are neat and clean – drinking water, neat and clean classrooms, neat and clean washrooms, separate entry and exit gate for boys and girls, separate park for boys & girls, and food quality in canteen is fine.

reviews.review_heading: Arya PG College is really good college because of their good facility and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-maintained classrooms, 24/7 CCTV cameras, a large collection of books in the library, fresh drinking water, separate parks for boys and girls, and very good canteen with fresh food. Free Wi-Fi is available for all students, and working computers are available in the internet zone attached to the library.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college was average.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure were average. The whole class had A.C., and the air was good. And Wi-Fi is also good with clean classrooms. And yes, my college has a canteen, and the food quality was also good; me and my friends used to eat from the college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Arya PG College is the top college in Panipat.
reviews.review_text: High-speed Wi-Fi in every classroom, fresh drinking water, neat and clean washrooms, working computers in the computer lab, and a library with a large collection of books available. Internet zone for students, a separate library sitting area for boys and girls, well-maintained infrastructure, and time-to-time renovation. Neat and clean food in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Arya PG College was my best learning experience.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well-maintained and facilities are top-notch. There is a CCTV camera in every area, a separate canteen, park, entry gates for boys and girls, a neat and clean study area, fresh and clean drinking water, a fresh and hygienic canteen, a variety of food, and an affordable price in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very poor placements, but it has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. New buildings are being constructed on the campus. One new building has already been constructed. It has 2-3 separate grounds for both boys and girls. There is no common ground for both. There is a separation in the canteen too for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied because of good placements since 2000 and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities they provide include free high-speed Wi-Fi, working computers in the lab, fresh drinking water, CCTV cameras, and neat and clean classrooms. Along with smart boards in all classes, a silent library that is good for reading, and an internet zone where we can access the internet on computers and learn new things. The canteen has the best quality of food. But the canteen food price is very high, so I order food from outside the college, like Swiggy or Zomato.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied because of the good infrastructure and very good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well-maintained. Benches are neat and clean, drinking water is fresh, washrooms are clean, and CCTV is installed. There is a separate gate and park for girls, and canteens for both boys and girls. Almost 80 students can sit in a classroom. The library is also good, well-maintained, and disciplined. The canteen food is very tasty, and I like it very much.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of their good faculty.
reviews.review_text: Almost all basic facilities are available in the college. It includes neat and clean washrooms, CCTV cameras in all classes, working computers in all labs, a large collection of books in the library, a silent and good environment in the library, and fresh drinking water. The quality of canteen food is fine. But I do not like the canteen food because the canteen is not properly neat and clean. The food quality is very bad. I recommend ordering food or going outside to eat.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with Arya PG College because of the good placement facilities and teacher behaviour.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well maintained regularly with maintenance time to time and facilities. They provide neat and clean benches CCTV cameras high speed Wi-Fi in lab and in internet zone. Large collection of books in the library. It is very silent good for reading. In computer lab AC is provided and a beautiful separate park for both boys and girls. The quality of food in canteen is average. Almost all types of food are available at very affordable prices.

reviews.review_heading: My honest review of Arya PG College.
reviews.review_text: Facilities given are okay, like working Wi-Fi (sometimes it is not working) and HD CCTV cameras in every class for security. Benches are neat and clean. The library is very good, providing a silent environment for students, and we can read any book, which helps most. College facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am totally satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are top-notch, including a well-maintained building, clean washrooms, fresh drinking water, and high-speed Wi-Fi in the library and labs. In a library, a large collection of books is available for reading. The quality of the canteen is good. Neat & clean canteen and tasty food.

reviews.review_heading: Totally satisfied with a good college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. There is high-speed Wi-Fi. Internet zone is provided. We have good teachers and staff support. There is a large collection of books in library. There is a good environment for studying and reading with full discipline. Canteen is good but food price is very high and messy.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Most of the classes are without CCTV cameras. Canteen is quite nice. Food served is okay. According to price, the food is worth it. The main thing is the whole campus. Wi-Fi is not available except in some computer labs. Only teachers can access the internet.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in the library, and classrooms are always clean. It also provides labs for students. Food is very good and tasty in the canteen. For players, they provide sports. It provides a hostel for students who live far from college. We can also participate in events and sports. It provides good and fresh quality food in the canteen. It has many courses and departments. It provides good security to students.

Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, IT & Software and Design. College offers BCA courses at the UG level. While, at the After 10th level, the college offers available programmes like After 10th Diploma. The Kasturba Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Pitampura Campus course fee ranges between INR 31,050 to 1,19,100.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Engineering College is here.

review_content.Placements: 50% of the students were placed in my course. The highest package is 4 lakh, the average is 3.5 lakh, and the lowest is 2.5 lakh in my course. The recruiting companies are Samsung, Bajaj, Reliance, ABB, and Siemens. Around 50 to 60 percent of students got internships in electronics courses. The different companies have different eligibility criteria, such as Design, Network Engineer, Components Design, Telecommunication, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is of very high quality. ACs or lights and fans are provided in all the classes. There is a library in the college which is comfortable. The water supply has been applied for 24 hours. There are 2 basketball courts. There are also facilities in the hostel, where many outsiders stay. Wi-Fi is also provided. There are also many labs. If I talk about the facilities, there is also a good hostel, ACs, canteen, grounds, library, washrooms, and labs — everything is provided by the college and the course.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because the scholarship was not provided to BCA students.

review_content.Placements: A total of 39 students are placed in BCA 2nd year. Yet not any BCA student got placements. Seminars are conducted on our campus. And companies also come in our 3rd year. I don't know about the package. Top roles in our course is we get entrepreneurship and financial learning classes .
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very bad. WiFi is not provided, and in labs, many computers are not working. A canteen is not available in college. The notebook is not allowed in the library. And the food in the hostel canteen is not much good. Sports and NCC are available. Classrooms are good.

answer.text: Graduates with a BTech degree in CSE are in high demand across a plethora of work fields, as everything is ruled by computer technology these days and every industry needs strong software applications, network security, and database management systems for effective working. A few top industries recruiting BTech in CSE graduates are given here:IT & SoftwareProduct DevelopmentE-Commerce and Digital CommerceCloud Computing & AIData Science & AnalyticsBanking and FinTechAutomotiveHealthcareUseful Link: BTech CSE Career Scope

faqs.question: Which industries hire students with a BTech CSE qualification?

answer.text: Yes, Electronics Engineers are also recruited by the DRDO. The organisation releases notification in case of any requirement or vacancy in the pertinent discipline. individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Jun 2023) - Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It's amazing; its infrastructure & study professors are very helpful & teach in a very unique style.

content.Placements: 80% of students were placed in the course, with an average package of 3-3.9 Lacs. Top recruiting companies included Atkins Realis, Technip Energies, Propage, Tata, Four Denial, Samsung, etc. Percentile is the percentage of values that are below a specific value.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure refers to the physical and organizational structures that support teaching and learning. It includes buildings, classrooms, libraries, laboratories, internet connectivity, and other facilities. Here are some examples of college infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college of Kasturba Pitampura

content.Placements: About 60-70% of students in course are placed. The salary packages offered range from 90 LPA to 3 LPA as per the 2024 placements. Top recruiting companies include Samsung and Sony. Over 60% of students got internships with companies like Infosys and Wipro. The role focus aligns with your interests, discussing goals, highlighting strengths, and researching in department.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in course include Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and hostels. Physical environment includes building rooms and land, and IT infrastructure includes hardware, software, computers, and networking. Maintenance includes regular upkeep of facilities, and technology includes systems to help with facilities management.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Engineering College is here.

content.Placements: 50% of the students were placed in my course. The highest package is 4 lakh, the average is 3.5 lakh, and the lowest is 2.5 lakh in my course. The recruiting companies are Samsung, Bajaj, Reliance, ABB, and Siemens. Around 50 to 60 percent of students got internships in electronics courses. The different companies have different eligibility criteria, such as Design, Network Engineer, Components Design, Telecommunication, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is of very high quality. ACs or lights and fans are provided in all the classes. There is a library in the college which is comfortable. The water supply has been applied for 24 hours. There are 2 basketball courts. There are also facilities in the hostel, where many outsiders stay. Wi-Fi is also provided. There are also many labs. If I talk about the facilities, there is also a good hostel, ACs, canteen, grounds, library, washrooms, and labs — everything is provided by the college and the course.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors in Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because the scholarship was not provided to BCA students.

content.Placements: A total of 39 students are placed in BCA 2nd year. Yet not any BCA student got placements. Seminars are conducted on our campus. And companies also come in our 3rd year. I don't know about the package. Top roles in our course is we get entrepreneurship and financial learning classes .
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are very bad. WiFi is not provided, and in labs, many computers are not working. A canteen is not available in college. The notebook is not allowed in the library. And the food in the hostel canteen is not much good. Sports and NCC are available. Classrooms are good.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: My experience at Delhi Skills and Entrepreneurship University .

content.Placements: 70% of students get placed in good companies. One of my seniors got an 8 LPA from Thought Works. The placement of electrical engineering students is also good; they are placed in good companies with a good salary package. Students have to find internships on their own.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel of the college is very neat and clean. The classrooms and the whole campus are very neat and clean. The library of the college is also good but they do not allow students to take their notebooks to the library; they only allow students to take pages inside the library.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied of the really good faculty, higher placements, and quite good infrastructure.

content.Placements: In the fashion designing course, my batch has the highest amount of admissions in 2022; currently we are in our 3rd year (in our last year). The highest package offer was 25,000, and the lowest was 10,000; it also depends on your work and the company you are going into. Cloth Caste, Ajio, and Reliance are the best recruiting companies. Internship is necessary because it holds 100 marks, and everyone has to go. In my course you can do designing, merchandising, illustration, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: We have labs, classrooms, and a library. Labs of stitching, a lab of cutting, a lab of pressing room, and a locker room to keep our stuff safe; computer labs with updated versions of different software; and now we also have a smart classroom with good Wi-Fi and AC.

Our college gives placements to almost every student. The college timing is 9 to 3.

Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Business & Management Studies, Accounting & Commerce and Design. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Sc., M.Com and M.A. The fee structure for the St. Aloysius College programmes is around INR 3,150 to 1,00,800.

review_content.Placements: In our college, 67% of the students from our course got placed. Maximum salary is Rs. 60,000 per month, and minimum salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. review_summary.college_name: St. Aloysius College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Com. in Finance - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Pros are a good canteen, library, washrooms, and a clean campus. Cons: some teachers have bad nature

content.Placements: There are many students in B.Com, and the package is also affordable. Many recruiting companies are there like banks and many more. Internship I do not know much about
content.Infrastructure: All are best according to me. There is free Wi-Fi in classrooms, and the rooms are good. Campus canteen and food taste good. The medical facilities are average. Sports section and games section are good. In a nutshell, the college is good, and students are good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable in a nutshell. Some teachers’ nature is good. If you study and pay attention in class, exams are not too difficult, but if you do not, it’s the opposite. It means you need to study well as the way to succeed. B.Com is the best, but some students think there is no Maths. They are wrong, see the book of Business Mathematics.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in the Mathematics Course.

content.Placements: Approximately 97% of students were placed in my course. The average package will be 16 LPA, and the highest package will be 21 LPA. All students from my batch and most of them got prestigious jobs. Top recruiters like Morgan Stanley, ISRO, NASA, etc. The top jobs are data analyst, operations researcher, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: This college is known for its facilities. All campuses have Wi-Fi facilities, and classes are well-equipped with smart boards. The KSOM library is large enough to provide its students with access to high-quality books and periodicals. The hotel is also good, with air conditioning in every room, and the mess and restaurant food is good, unlike most colleges.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Mathematics - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: This is the best college for M.Sc. in Mathematics course.

content.Placements: In our college, 67% of the students from our course got placed. Maximum salary is Rs. 60,000 per month, and minimum salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. Average salary was Rs. 30,000 per month. DRDO, Infosys, and Wipro are the top recruiting companies in our survey. About 62% of the students from our course got internships. Top roles offered are Data Scientist, Data Analyst, and so on.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities at our college are awesome. Our college provides us with all we need. Our university contains numerous labs and classrooms. Shared library at our college. Library is available for IT students. Our college features two canteens. Bus station is located within our college.

individual_reviews.course: BBA in Finance - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My college have good facility about career opportunities.

content.Placements: 85% of placements are offered to my course. The highest package of my course is 6 LPA and the lowest package of my course is 3.2 LPA. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Infosys, ADX, and so many. More than 90% of students got internships from my college .
content.Infrastructure: College has small campus and many facilities like fitness room, library, smart classrooms, and auditorium, and also has Wi-Fi facilities, a computer lab, etc. College have canteen but does not have hostel facilities. College conducts many sports tournament and NCC classes. They organize events like Meraki, gathering, etc.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Zoology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of St. Aloysius College.

content.Placements: The placement and job opportunities in this field are enormous. Jobs are available in both the government and private sectors with high salary packages. The college provides on-campus recruitment facilities. The college also provides placement training for the screening process. There are no internships for M.Sc. courses. For M.Tech courses, they provide an Internship as per government rules, with a stipend of Rs.18,000 per month. I didn't get any internship, but the college is good.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are available within walking distance. The food and facilities provided for students are good. Inter-hostel tournaments are played every year. Hostels are clean and maintained in good condition. Wi-Fi is also provided by the campus to students, so they can study and improve themselves.

According to the India Today Ranking 2025, the institute has been awarded #70 rank in the B.A. category. The institute is a top-ranked institute because of its equipped infrastructure and well-educated faculty. Check the article given below to know details around St. Aloysius College rankings.

rankings.highlight: 3rd Best Among India Today Ranked Colleges In Kerala In 2025

hostel_campus.college_name: St. Aloysius College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Pros are a good canteen, library, washrooms, and a clean campus. Cons: some teachers have bad nature
reviews.review_text: All are best according to me. There is free Wi-Fi in classrooms, and the rooms are good. Campus canteen and food taste good. The medical facilities are average. Sports section and games section are good. In a nutshell, the college is good, and students are good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the best college for M.Sc. in the Mathematics Course.
reviews.review_text: This college is known for its facilities. All campuses have Wi-Fi facilities, and classes are well-equipped with smart boards. The KSOM library is large enough to provide its students with access to high-quality books and periodicals. The hotel is also good, with air conditioning in every room, and the mess and restaurant food is good, unlike most colleges.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for M.Sc. in Mathematics course.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at our college are awesome. Our college provides us with all we need. Our university contains numerous labs and classrooms. Shared library at our college. Library is available for IT students. Our college features two canteens. Bus station is located within our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college have good facility about career opportunities.
reviews.review_text: College has small campus and many facilities like fitness room, library, smart classrooms, and auditorium, and also has Wi-Fi facilities, a computer lab, etc. College have canteen but does not have hostel facilities. College conducts many sports tournament and NCC classes. They organize events like Meraki, gathering, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of St. Aloysius College.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are available within walking distance. The food and facilities provided for students are good. Inter-hostel tournaments are played every year. Hostels are clean and maintained in good condition. Wi-Fi is also provided by the campus to students, so they can study and improve themselves.

reviews.review_heading: My favourite college which is famous for placements.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have its own hostel but close to it is offered mess rent with a low rent. The infrastructure and the college are very advanced, and Wi-Fi is available everywhere. The college has a library and such books that there are also quiet places to sit. The college has a nice garage for storing cars and bicycles. The college has a big football field.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and the department really helped us to complete the course. The teachers are friendly.
reviews.review_text: We have a gemology lab with all the stones and needed equipment and instruments. There is a jewelry lab with computers for CAD. There is a library with all kinds of books necessary. Hostel food is average. The hostel provides us with bunk beds, a rack for storage, and chairs. There is a study hall, which is also used as a dining area.

reviews.review_heading: Journey to the future ahead.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was great. The labs were average, and the library is big and clean, and it can help us in our educational purpose. The canteen facility is average, and sports and games facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: The college campus one shouldn't have.
reviews.review_text: The library is very suffocating. The college campus is very small and it is very crowded. There’s  no network in our college either. The food we get from the canteen is very tasty and it has all the types of meals we want to eat. The college doesn’t have any sick room or any games or sports available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, ambiance, and many more.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi facilities for students. Labs and classrooms are well maintained. There are plenty of books related to all courses in the library. Hostel facilities are provided for girls, and PGs are available for boys. The canteen ensures quality food items.

reviews.review_heading: A good institute and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: There are good laboratories, classroom facilities in our college, and a library is also available where most of the books are available. The food quality in our college hostel is good and provides good facilities for sports and games. They provide well-stocked library is present.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college life at Aloysius.
reviews.review_text: I didn't stay at the hostel so I don't know about the facilities there, but our class room was well maintained and had all the facilities like tv, projector, fans, light, etc. They have a large library with many options of books, novels, references, etc. o many subjects available.

reviews.review_heading: All the exams are easy to pass.
reviews.review_text: The college provides hostel facilities with food for needy students. Rooms are shared by three members and equipped with three beds, a wardrobe, and a detached bathroom. Water facilities are available without interruption. The college offers normal-quality food with options in both North Indian and South Indian flavors. The hostel fee is INR 30,000 per year.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is covered with good environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college management provides better classrooms with free Wi-Fi to complete projects, assignments, etc. There are high-tech labs. It has a free library for students to gain information that consists of a lot of books and a calm place to study. Hostels are provided for girls. Food and medical facilities are very good. They arrange sports and games for girls.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good atmosphere and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a large, beautiful, and green campus. The infrastructure of our campus is good. Our college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, basketball, football, cricket grounds, and a parking facility. The food served in the canteen is average. The hostel facilities are available for girls only. Medical facilities are fewer. There is no boys' hostel in our college.

college_info.college_name: Bhagwan Mahavir University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Founded in 2019, Bhagwan Mahavir University is a private university. It is located in Surat, Gujarat. The institute is accredited with INC, AICTE and PCI. Bhagwan Mahavir University provides UG, PG and Certificate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 184 courses across specialisations such as Data Science, Aeronautical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Automation and Automobile Engineering. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Bhagwan Mahavir University fees ranges between INR 18,000 to 4,35,750. The student intake for these courses is 7142. Bhagwan Mahavir University offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce and Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ). Bhagwan Mahavir University offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college. It is the best place for your future.

review_content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary is 1 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 30,000. Around 80-90% of students got internships from my course in hospitals. The top role offered is a psychologist.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is good. The classrooms, library, labs, and halls are all perfect. The hostel facilities and food quality are also satisfactory. Meals are provided regularly and at an affordable price. Sports events and medical facilities are available, especially for girls.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Thought of a student who studied in college.

review_content.Placements: In my college, approximately total of 5% to 10% of students are placed every year from this course. College doesn't provide any kind of internship students must find their internships. Only after securing an internship are they eligible to sit for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: They are least facilities provided by college to students. In college, there's a lift but it doesn't work for students. There is a very big problem with network in college after knowing that the college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facilities to students. For the use of library, we have to provide fees.

review_summary.college_name: Bhagwan Mahavir University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good university in Surat.

content.Placements: Placements are given but not more than 25000 rupees. Placements are given in big companies like Amazon, Flipkart, Google, Tata Motors, and many other companies. All courses are available. Here computer students are more than other students so placements are good.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are provided here. Infrastructure is also very good. All departments are separate. There are many classes. Each class has 50 students. Canteen is very good and hygienic. All types of food are available here, and staffs are also good in nature, friendly, and cheaper than market.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Not recommended for anyone. You should try some other colleges.

content.Placements: Not many students get placed from the college. The college claims 100% placement, but that is not true, so don't trust them. In Computer Science, placements are based on grades and marks, which often lead to cheap and unknown companies or services.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel available here. The labs are good, but the Wi-Fi is poor and not accessible to students. The library is very small, with no comfortable seating. The computers in the labs are not well maintained and can go down at any time. There is no official canteen; there are some stalls, but they are not satisfactory.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Psychology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college. It is the best place for your future.

content.Placements: Around 80-90% of students got placed in our course. The highest salary is 1 LPA. The lowest salary is Rs. 30,000. Around 80-90% of students got internships from my course in hospitals. The top role offered is a psychologist.
content.Infrastructure: Everything is good. The classrooms, library, labs, and halls are all perfect. The hostel facilities and food quality are also satisfactory. Meals are provided regularly and at an affordable price. Sports events and medical facilities are available, especially for girls.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Thought of a student who studied in college.

content.Placements: In my college, approximately total of 5% to 10% of students are placed every year from this course. College doesn't provide any kind of internship students must find their internships. Only after securing an internship are they eligible to sit for placements.
content.Infrastructure: They are least facilities provided by college to students. In college, there's a lift but it doesn't work for students. There is a very big problem with network in college after knowing that the college doesn't provide Wi-Fi facilities to students. For the use of library, we have to provide fees.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of collage overall choice or not.

content.Placements: Students were placed on their skills, not based on this collage. College did not provide placements but could provide assistance placements. But we could not go for imaging and got jobs after course. Because this college did not provide proper placements.
content.Faculty: Teachers were great. They properly guide us for future planet and other our life success. They could help us friendly but some teachers were not friendly. They could attract good and communicate students to help the good students who were generous. College staff was also good. They could give important questions that come in exam so filler does not change in exam. Staff was also good and friendly. But other mentors were not good because they could also not provide proper student paths. Quality of education was not provided properly.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Alpha College of Engineering?
What is the placement percentage at Alpha College of Engineering?
What is the average package offered during Alpha College of Engineering placements?

college_info.intro: Alpha College of Engineering's popular programmes are BE/ BTech and MBA. The college offers BE/ BTech four-year full-time specialisation in Biomedical Engineering, CSE, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Robotics & Automation Engineering, AI & Data Science, and Information Technology. The below-mentioned are Alpha College of Engineering's popular programmes:

placements.overview: Alpha College of Engineering has a placement cell that helps the students to determine their career goals acquire career-oriented skills and attain their desired employment. The institute offers training in group discussion, aptitude tests, numerical ability, technical skills and others. The institute has a placement officer who organises recruitment drives both on-campus and off-campus. Alpha College of Engineering has a 95% placement rate. The top recruiters are HCL, HP, Wipro, Cognizant, IBM, Infosys, Amazon, and others. Candidates can check below the Alpha College of Engineering placement highlights:

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, ACE has a Career Development Cell that aids the Academic Departments in creating employable graduates for the industry. The Cell provides both Technical and non-technical training right from the first day of the students in the college. The career development initiative includes the following trainings: Aptitude Enhancement Training, Quantitative Aptitude Training, Mathematics Fundamentals Training, and Computer Application Skills, among others.
faqs.question: Does Alpha College of Engineering have a placement cell?

faqs.answer: A:    The key highlights of Alpha College of Engineering placements 2024 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2024)the highest packageINR 9 LPAAverage packageINR 2.75 LPAPlacement rate95%Popular recruitersPropel Software Pvt. Ltd., Mitsogo Solutions, Sundaram Fasteners Pvt. Ltd.
faqs.question: How are the placements at Alpha College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    There are numerous ways to prepare for an interview and crack it. The three most effective parameters are mentioned below:Confidence- This creates the first impression that will help in further communicationCommunication Skills- The interviewer looks for a candidate who can put his/ her points with clarity and precision. Even after having sound technical skills, poor communication skills can create a negative impact.Knowledge- Regularly go through newspapers and social media tools to stay
faqs.question: How to prepare for Alpha College of Engineering placement interview?

faqs.answer: A:    According to unofficial online sources, a large share of Alpha College of Engineering alumni is placed in the Engineering sector with a 40% share. The table below illustrates the sector-wise split of alumni:SectorAlumni PlacementsEngineering40%Information Technology22%Operations13%Business Development11%Human Resources7%Sales7%
faqs.question: Where are Alpha College of Engineering alumni placed?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Alpha College of Engineering offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses across Engineering and Management. At the UG level, the institute offers BTech courses. At the PG level, the institute offers MTech and MBA programmes offered to the students. The below-mentioned are Alpha College of Engineering courses along with the eligibility criteria and Alpha College of Engineering fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Alpha College of Engineering has affordable fee structure. The institute offers UG and PG programmes in Engineering and Management stream. The fee structure ranges between INR 1 LPA- INR 2.8 LPA. The fee structure includes multiple components, such as tuition fees, laboratory fees, security deposit, alumni fees, etc. Some of these are one-time payments that are charged by Alpha College of Engineering at the time of admission.
faqs.question: How costly is studying at Alpha College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Alpha College of Engineering is not hard to get but its competitive. The institute accepts admission based on merit and entrance exams. The college accepts TNEA counselling scores for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE and CEETA exam scores for admission to MBA and M.E. respectively. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course.
faqs.question: Is Alpha College of Engineering hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Alpha College of Engineering admission is open for M.E. The college offers entrance-based admission to M.E. The college accepts various entrance exams for admission to M.E including GATE and CEETA. Candidates looking for admission to Alpha College of Engineering must fill out the online application form by visiting the official website of the college.
faqs.question: Can I apply for M.E. at Alpha College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    No, without TNEA counselling candidates cannot apply for the BTech programme at Alpha College of Engineering. To be eligible for admission to BTech/B.E., the candidates must apply and appear in the counselling round. Additionally, for other courses including M.E. and MBA, it is not mandatory to appear in TNEA counselling.
faqs.question: Can I join Alpha College of Engineering without TNEA Counselling?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Alpha College of Engineering.

review_content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed is very low. The package for students is 3.50 LPA. The top recruiting companies are coding companies. Every student gets internship facilities in a hospital. The students get on-hand training with every department and every piece of equipment.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lab facilities and the library facilities are good. The students can use the labs and library during college hours. The college provides Wi-Fi facilities and systems for the project work and innovation cell. The hostel is normal; there are no washing machines or Wi-Fi.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. Companies like Equatron, etc., visit our college. Top roles offered are sales, service, and image processing. The salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like a CSE lab, a Cisco lab, an IT lab, a conference room, an auditorium, a seminar hall, smart rooms, a medical room, etc. The food served in the hostel should be better. The boys' hostel is very good. The girls' hostel is inside the campus.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are doing their best for our careers. They are very good. Semester exams are a little bit difficult. The pass percentage is around 80-90%.

review_summary.college_name: Alpha College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Alpha College of Engineering: A place for passion.

content.Placements: Placements are good. There have been many companies brought by my college. Some top companies are TCS, Infosys, HCL, etc. They provide good placements and training programs. My college has brought many other companies in various departments.
content.Infrastructure: My college has a good infrastructure with smart projectors, lab equipment, etc. On using this kind we get a good knowledge on our subject and it paves way for easy understanding.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are very good. They provide us with good knowledge on topics and also they are friendly and they teach us in a clarifying way. They took classes with sheer interest and passion and they gave us our own comfort zone where we can interact with them easily at any time without any hesitation. My faculty members also taught valueable lessons on life. They are not staff, they are our well-wishers.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because of faculty, sports, and good placements.

content.Placements: 95% of students get placed in my course. Placements are very nice in my course. The highest package offered in my course is 9 LPA. The lowest package is 6 LPA. 100% of students got internships from my course in companies.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are very kind and friendly. The teaching is very good. The library and laboratory are very good. The canteen is average in food. Hostels are average in pace. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Alpha College of Engineering.

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placed is very low. The package for students is 3.50 LPA. The top recruiting companies are coding companies. Every student gets internship facilities in a hospital. The students get on-hand training with every department and every piece of equipment.
content.Infrastructure: The lab facilities and the library facilities are good. The students can use the labs and library during college hours. The college provides Wi-Fi facilities and systems for the project work and innovation cell. The hostel is normal; there are no washing machines or Wi-Fi.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college is very good.

content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed in our college. Companies like Equatron, etc., visit our college. Top roles offered are sales, service, and image processing. The salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides facilities like a CSE lab, a Cisco lab, an IT lab, a conference room, an auditorium, a seminar hall, smart rooms, a medical room, etc. The food served in the hostel should be better. The boys' hostel is very good. The girls' hostel is inside the campus.
content.Faculty: Teachers are doing their best for our careers. They are very good. Semester exams are a little bit difficult. The pass percentage is around 80-90%.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college has great campus and infrastructure, but placements are good.

content.Placements: Around 96% of students are placed in our course. The top recruiting companies are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, and many more. There is no drawback in our college and students are trained from the pre-final year to face the interviews for the final year.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. There are an auditorium, playground, and many laboratories in our college. The surroundings of our college are very good. There are many classrooms and common rooms in our college. There is also a sick room. The hostel surroundings are great and the quality of the food available in the mess and canteen is hygienic

admission_overview.college_name: Alpha College of Engineering Courses Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Selection Criteria & Dates

admission_process.title: Alpha College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Alpha College of Engineering offers three courses at UG and PG levels, BTech/B.E, M.E and MBA. Admission to all the courses is entrance-based. Aspirants, willing to apply for admission atAlpha College of Engineeringmust register for entrance exams and appear for the same. The college is affiliated withAnna University, However, the institute follows the admission norms of Anna University for admission to BTech/B.E, M.E and MBA courses. To know the latest information related to Alpha College of Engineering admission 2025, go through the below sections:

Alpha College of Engineering admission is ongoing for all courses. The college offers entrance-based admission to all courses. The college offers UG, and PG, courses, includingBTech/B.E., M.E. andMBA. Alpha College of Engineering offers one undergraduate course, including BTech/B.E.. The duration of the courses is four years. The college also offers an M.E. and MBA at the postgraduate level for two years.

To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for the entrance exam accepted by the college. The college acceptsTNEA counsellingscores for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE and CEETA exam scores for admission to MBA and M.E., respectively. Want to know other details aboutAlpha College of Engineering courseeligibility along with selection criteria, check out the table below:
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Graduation degree in a relevant field with 50% aggreagte (45% aggreagte for reserved category) from a recognised institute/university
B.E. / BTech
Class 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggreagte (40% for reserved category) from a recognised board
Graduation degree 50% aggreagte (45% aggreagte for reserved category) in a relevant field from a recognised institute/university

Alpha College of Engineering admission process includes filling out the application form qualifying for the selection rounds and paying the fee to grab the final seat. Check below the detailed steps of Alpha College of Engineering admission process 2025:
STEP 1: Alpha College of Engineering Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to register for TANCET, GATE and CEETA for admission to PG courses. Additionally, for admission to BTech/ B.E. candidates are required to register and appear for TNEA Counselling. Candidates are required to visit the official website of the college to fill out the application form online for admission.
STEP 2: Alpha College of Engineering Selection Round

Alpha College of Engineering selects candidates for BTech/ B.E., MBA andM.E.based on entrance exams along with counselling such as TNEA Counselling, TANCET, GATE and CEETA entrance exams, respectively.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
The selected candidates are required to pay theAlpha College of Engineering course feeto complete their enrollment within the given deadline to confirm and grab the final seat.

courses_data.name: Alpha College of Engineering B.E/BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Alpha College of Engineering B.E/BTech admission 2025 is open via TNEA. The institute offers B.E./BTech at the UG level with a duration of three years. Applicants looking for admission to Alpha College of Engineering must have to appear for TNEA counselling. Further, candidates must fulfil basic eligibility criteria such as qualifying forClass 10andClass 12with 45% aggreagte (40% for reserved category) from a recognised board from a recognised board. Checkout below for more information on the Alpha College of Engineering B.E./BTech Courses:

faqs.question: How can I get admission to Alpha College of Engineering for BTech?
faqs.answer: Alpha College of Engineering offers entrance-based admission to B.E./BTech. To be eligible for admission to B.E./BTech, candidates are required to pass Class 10 and Class 12 with 45% aggreagte (40% for reserved category) from a recognised board from a recognised board. Additionally, candidates are required to apply and appear for TNEA Counselling accepted by the college. After filling out all the eligibility criteria candidates need to apply for admission form online.

faqs.question: How many B.E./BTech specialisations are offered at Alpha College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Alpha College of Engineering admission to B.E./BTech programme is based on TNEA Counselling. The B.E./BTech programmes are offered in seven specialisations as given below:B.E./BTech SpecilisationB.E. Biomedical EngineeringB.E.  Computer Science and EngineeringB.E. Electronic and Communication EngineeringB.E. Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security)B.E. Robotics and Automation EngineeringBTech AI and Data ScienceBTech Iinformation Technology--

faqs.question: How costly is studying at Alpha College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Alpha College of Engineering has affordable fee structure. The institute offers UG and PG programmes in Engineering and Management stream. The fee structure ranges between INR 1 LPA- INR 2.8 LPA. The fee structure includes multiple components, such as tuition fees, laboratory fees, security deposit, alumni fees, etc. Some of these are one-time payments that are charged by Alpha College of Engineering at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Is Alpha College of Engineering hard to get?
faqs.answer: Alpha College of Engineering is not hard to get but its competitive. The institute accepts admission based on merit and entrance exams. The college accepts TNEA counselling scores for admission to BTech/B.E. and TANCET, GATE and CEETA exam scores for admission to MBA and M.E. respectively. Aspiring candidates must qualify for the eligibility criteria set by the institute for the desired course.

courses_data.name: Alpha College of Engineering MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Alpha College of Engineering MBA admission is entirely entrance-based. Candidate must pass graduation degree to be eligible to apply for the course. Additionally, candidates are required to apply and appear for TANCET exam, followed by counselling. Mention below are more updates aboutAlpha College of Engineering MBA admission 2025:

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Alpha College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, Alpha College of Engineering offers an MBA course for two years. The college offers admission to MBA entirely entrance-based. To be eligible for admission, candidates are required to apply and appear for TANCET exam, followed by counselling. To fill out the application form candidates are required to visit the college's official website. Additionally, candidates must pass graduation in the relevant stream to be eligible to apply for the course.

courses_data.name: Alpha College of Engineering M.E. Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Alpha College of Engineering offers entrance-based admission to M.E.. The college accepts GATE and GEETA entrance exam scores. Alpha College of Engineering M.E. offers a two-year full-time course at the postgraduate level. For admission to M.E., candidates are required to visit the official website of the college to apply for admission. Check below to know more aboutAlpha College of Engineering M.E. admission 2025:

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission to M.E. at Alpha College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: No, Alpha College of Engineering offers entrance-based admission to M.E. Candidates are required to apply and appear for the accepted entrance exams such as GATE and CEETA. After filling out the eligibility criteria candidates are required to apply on the official website of the college to fill out the admission form. After all the procedures the college releases its merit list. If the candidates got selected on merit they are required to pay the admission fee to lock their final seats.

faqs.question: Can I apply for M.E. at Alpha College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Alpha College of Engineering admission is open for M.E. The college offers entrance-based admission to M.E. The college accepts various entrance exams for admission to M.E including GATE and CEETA. Candidates looking for admission to Alpha College of Engineering must fill out the online application form by visiting the official website of the college.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Alpha College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Alpha College of Engineering admission to B.E./BTech, M.E. and MBA is based on TNEA Counselling, GATE, CEETA-PG and TANCET entrance exams, respectively. Further, to be eligible for admission, applicants also need to pass Class 10 and Class 12 for admission to BTech/B.E. and graduation degree for admission to M.E. and MBA.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Alpha College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes, Alpha College of Engineering accepts various entrance exams for admission to UG and PG, courses. The college offers one UG i.e., BTech/B.E. and two PG courses i.e., M.E. and MBA. The college accepts TNEA counselling for admission to BTech and TANCET, GATE, and CEETA for admission to MBA and M.E., respectively. After filling out the admission criteria set by the college, candidates are required to apply to the official website of the college and fill out the admission form.

faqs.question: Can I join Alpha College of Engineering without TNEA Counselling?
faqs.answer: No, without TNEA counselling candidates cannot apply for the BTech programme at Alpha College of Engineering. To be eligible for admission to BTech/B.E., the candidates must apply and appear in the counselling round. Additionally, for other courses including M.E. and MBA, it is not mandatory to appear in TNEA counselling.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for Alpha College of Engineering UG and PG course?
faqs.answer: The fee differs from course to course. Alpha College of Engineering offers three courses BTech/B.E., MBA and M.E. The fee contains various components such as admission fee, caution deposit and tuition fee. Candidates note that the given fee is as per the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Below is the table showing UG and PG course fees at Alpha College of Engineering:CoursesTuition FeeBTech/B.E.INR 2.8 lakhM.E.INR 1 lakhMBAINR 1.4 lakh

hostel.description: Institute has a co-ed hostel which accommodates 100 students, with separate wings for boys and girls, ensuring privacy and security. Each room is twin-sharing or triple-sharing, furnished with study tables, wardrobes, and comfortable beds. The hostel provides 24/7 security, Wi-Fi, a hygienic mess, laundry, and medical assistance. Recreational facilities include common rooms with TV, indoor games, and reading materials. With power backup and a safe, disciplined environment, the hostel offers a comfortable and supportive space for students.

reviews.review_text: In our hostel the facilities are excellent. There is no issue regarding the food in the hostel. The environment is pleasant. The playground is near to the hostel. So, the students can spend their time in a useful way. In hostel it also have a study room.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for the one who want to become an engineer.
reviews.review_text: This college has a very good spacious classroom, well-equipped laboratories, a fully air-conditioned auditorium, seminar hall, library, and student learning center. Hostel facilities are good with proper food and medical facilities. Students are involved in various sports events.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college because of its good faculty members and good placements for 2022.
reviews.review_text: This college provides excellent infrastructure, and facilities are well equipped with laboratory, spacious classroom, library, seminar hall with air conditioner, auditorium with air conditioner, good canteen facilities and food, and large playground are available with sports kits.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: Our management provides all the necessary facilities like well-equipped laboratories, department libraries, van facilities, hostel facilities, etc. They provide good quality food in the canteen. Our college gives equal importance to both academic and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Alpha College of Engineering is a good college with a good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: We have a very good infrastructure in our college. There is neatness in classrooms. In labs, we have all the equipment for all the experiments. We have a good library in our college. In our college, we are provided with food for hostel students. In the canteen outside food is not allowed for students, health is very important.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best option to upgrade your career.
reviews.review_text: The campus is lush green and gives a peaceful environment which helps to feel relaxed from every academic pressure. There are various departments in engineering. There is a hostel and canteen, which are comfortable for distant students. The campus has a vast area for students who are interested in playing football and cricket to show their talents.

reviews.review_heading: There are very good faculty members, 100% placements and good education in our college.
reviews.review_text: All departments have good labs. Classrooms are very hygienic, and a Wi-Fi facility is also available in our college. The hostel is also nice, and the food served is average. Our college conducts inter-college competitions for sports like football, cricket, badminton, etc. There are also good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: This is a way to learn and execute the innovative and many interesting things in our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Hostel and canteen are available with good facilities. It has well-maintained labs and libraries. The college provides hostel facilities inside and outside the campus at affordable fees. The college offers BE in computer science, biomedical engineering, IT, mechanical engineering, electrical and communication engineering, and also MBA. Sports are conducted every week. P.E.T classes are also conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is quite a nice college to enroll yourself to become a good engineer.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite good. The classrooms and playground on campus are good. The college has all facilities like lab, library. Medical care and facilities are provided here. The hostel rooms are hygienic and spacious. The food quality in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best engineering institute I have ever seen.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a great infrastructure with advanced laboratories. The college is located in a well-transporting area. The college environment makes us calm and composed of studies. Classrooms are spacious with an adequate number of benches.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Shankaracharya Technical Campus Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Integrated BCA+ MCA - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good college which has all good quality which is required for any graduation course.

content.Placements: Minimum and average students are placed in my course. Students who pursue different subjects like bio, commerce, and arts are also placed in the same way. The highest package offered is 8.5 LPA, and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruitment is there in Reliance, Nilon, and many others.
content.Infrastructure: There are computer labs, science labs, and a library for various experiments and educational purposes. Medical facilities are also provided at Shankaracharya Hospital. Sports and playgrounds are also good. A canteen is provided for lunch. Students who are interested in sports can play wherever they want.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is decent, with supportive faculty and departments. It is value for money.

content.Placements: There are placements, but they are not up to the mark when compared to the total number of students graduated. Faculty members promise 100 percent placement when you take admission into this college, but providing placement to even 200 graduates out of 1000 cannot be called 100% placement.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are decent. There is a separate hostel for freshers and another for seniors, so there is no ragging in this college. You share a room with 2-3 people in the first year, and from the second year, 2 people occupy one room. However, most students shift outside the campus to PGs, flats, etc., after the first year.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This college is good for engineering.

content.Placements: I am Yash Chandra, studying in SSTC, doing B.Tech in CSE (AIML). I chose this subject because of AI development in the future. The average package was 4 LPA in several companies like Amazon, Microsoft, etc., which is good. You can choose this college for a better future with government jobs if you top this university.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facilities are good. There is good availability of Wi-Fi, cleanliness of rooms, the mess food is okay, and the hostel is also good. There are also medical facilities available in our hostel as well as in college, and indoor game equipment is also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Infrastructure is good. Placements are basic. Academic and cultural is way better .

content.Placements: I am in the 3rd year of college Our seniors get placed this year Basically the percentage of placement in our college is about 60% because most of the students go for GATE exam &startups. The placements are quite normal with a basic package it depends on your skills that how much you are getting paid. The highest package is something around 10 LPA and the lowest is not fixed but a roughly figure is 3LPA. Companies that visit in IT and CS branches for the placement are TCS mostly and sometimes there is google and other multinational companies.
content.Infrastructure: Our infrastructure is quite basic, classroom are average and library is very nice with Wi-Fi facility. Our technical labs are good and have nice internet connection. Overall our infrastructure is quite good and advance. Medical and sports facilities are quite good in our college because our college has ha medical branch also near our campus. Hostal food is good in boys hostal but basic in girls hostel I will prefer for tiffin service for a better health. Our canteen is good for having snacks and lunch good environment and pockets friendly.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I will not recommend this college as it is now overcrowded for B.Pharmacy.

content.Placements: Nearly 10-20% students are placed through campus drives. Salary packages range from 2 LPA to 5 LPA. Top recruiter is 3M. Around 50% of students get internships in pharma companies for roles such as sales, production, QA, and research. It has scope for more companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are spacious, but mostly simple seating, like benches/desks. It also equipped with blackboards/whiteboards, sometimes a projector. Basic ventilation and fans, and AC are limited to seminar halls only. There are different labs for different subjects. There is one life really sufficient for B.Pharmacy. Students have no access to Wi-Fi. I haven't lived in hostel but I have listened to different students who say that hostel food is the worst. There is no specific sports and games period, we only get to play when there is a festival or different pharmacy days.
